description: Funds the CSM, the constitutional body guaranteeing judicial independence, responsible for appointing magistrates, judicial discipline, and advising on justice matters.
beneficiaries: CSM members, magistrates

name: Dotation du Mecanisme europeen de stabilite
description: France's EUR 20.3 billion capital contributions to the ESM eurozone bailout fund.
beneficiaries: ESM, eurozone stability

name: Conduite et pilotage de la politique de l'immigration et de l'asile
description: Administrative steering for immigration/asylum. Functions absorbed into 303 and 104.
beneficiaries: OFII, immigration services

name: Augmentation de capital de la Banque europeenne d'investissement
description: France's capital subscriptions to the EIB for EU investment capacity.
beneficiaries: EIB, European investment projects

name: Haut Conseil des finances publiques
description: Independent fiscal council assessing macroeconomic forecasts. Absorbed into programme 164.
beneficiaries: HCFP, Parliament

name: Conditions de vie outre-mer (former)
description: Former programme number for overseas living conditions. Renumbered as programme 123.
beneficiaries: Overseas territory residents

name: Plan France Tres haut debit
description: Funds the national broadband plan to provide fiber-optic FTTH internet access to 100% of French territory, bridging the digital divide in rural areas.
beneficiaries: Rural and underserved areas, telecom operators, local authorities

name: Fonds de soutien relatif aux prets et contrats financiers structures a risque
description: Provides support (EUR 3 billion over 15 years) to local authorities and hospitals holding toxic structured financial products (Dexia-era loans).
beneficiaries: Local authorities and hospitals with toxic structured loans

name: Service public de l'energie
description: Covers public service obligations (CSPE) for energy: renewable electricity feed-in tariffs, social energy tariffs, island territory energy costs (ZNI), and cogeneration support.
beneficiaries: Renewable energy producers, island territories, energy-poor households

name: Participation de l'Etat au desendettement de SNCF Reseau
description: Principal repayment of EUR 35 billion SNCF Reseau debt (2018 railway reform).
beneficiaries: State balance sheet, SNCF Reseau

name: Protection judiciaire de la jeunesse (former)
description: Former programme number for judicial youth protection. Renumbered as programme 182.
beneficiaries: Juvenile offenders, PJJ educators

name: Performance et resilience des batiments de l'Etat et de ses operateurs
description: Funds energy renovation and climate resilience improvements for State buildings and public operators, targeting carbon neutrality of the State's 100 million sqm portfolio.
beneficiaries: State building occupants, public operators, energy efficiency sector

name: Transformation publique
description: Supports digital transformation and modernization of public services through DITP, including user experience improvements, France Services, and administrative simplification.
beneficiaries: DITP, public service users, government agencies

name: Fonds de transformation de l'action publique
description: Competitive fund for innovative public transformation projects. Absorbed into programme 349.
beneficiaries: Government agencies

name: Innovation et transformation numeriques
description: Digital innovation (FranceConnect, data.gouv.fr, DINUM platforms). Absorbed into programme 129.
beneficiaries: DINUM, digital services

name: Administration territoriale de l'Etat
mission: Administration generale et territoriale de l'Etat
description: Funds the prefectoral network (101 prefectures, 234 sub-prefectures), deconcentrated State services (DDI/DREETS), and 2,700+ France Services access points.
beneficiaries: Prefectures, sub-prefectures, France Services points, citizens

name: Charge de la dette de SNCF Reseau reprise par l'Etat (credits evaluatifs)
description: Covers interest charges on EUR 35 billion of SNCF Reseau debt transferred to the State following the 2018 railway reform (Pacte ferroviaire).
beneficiaries: State creditors, SNCF Reseau

name: Prise en charge par l'Etat du financement de l'economie - COVID
mission: Plan d'urgence face a la crise sanitaire
description: State-guaranteed loans (PGE, EUR 140 billion) and solidarity fund during COVID-19. Crisis programme, closed.
beneficiaries: SMEs, businesses

name: Fonds de solidarite pour les entreprises - COVID
mission: Plan d'urgence face a la crise sanitaire
description: Direct grants to small businesses during COVID lockdowns. Total: EUR 40 billion.
beneficiaries: Small businesses, restaurants

name: Renforcement exceptionnel des participations financieres - COVID
mission: Plan d'urgence face a la crise sanitaire
description: Emergency equity injections to strategic companies (Air France-KLM, EDF, Renault).
beneficiaries: Air France-KLM, EDF

name: Compensation a la Securite sociale - COVID
mission: Plan d'urgence face a la crise sanitaire
description: Compensated Social Security for COVID employer charge exemptions (EUR 5 billion).
beneficiaries: Hospitality, events sectors

name: Ecologie
description: Ecology pillar of France Relance (EUR 30 billion recovery plan): building energy renovation, green mobility, biodiversity, circular economy, and green hydrogen investments.
beneficiaries: Homeowners, public buildings, green transport, biodiversity sector

name: Competitivite
description: Competitiveness pillar of France Relance: industrial relocation, digital transformation, R&D support (PIA4 precursor), and business competitiveness measures.
beneficiaries: Industrial firms, SMEs, R&D sector, digital economy

name: Cohesion
description: Social cohesion pillar of France Relance: 1 jeune 1 solution youth employment, social solidarity, territorial cohesion.
beneficiaries: Youth jobseekers, social sector

name: Renforcement des fonds propres de l'Agence francaise de developpement
description: Provides equity reinforcement to AFD to support its lending capacity for development cooperation in Africa, Middle East, and Indo-Pacific.
beneficiaries: AFD, developing countries

name: Materiels sanitaires - COVID
mission: Plan d'urgence face a la crise sanitaire
description: Emergency purchases of masks, ventilators, tests, PPE. Total: EUR 7 billion.
beneficiaries: Hospitals, healthcare workers

name: Chomage partiel - COVID
mission: Plan d'urgence face a la crise sanitaire
description: Exceptional partial unemployment (activite partielle) scheme during COVID. Total: EUR 35 billion.
beneficiaries: Furloughed workers, employers

name: Conduite et pilotage de la transformation et de la fonction publiques
description: Administrative steering of public transformation policy: coordination, evaluation, and piloting of civil service reform and government modernization projects.
beneficiaries: DGAFP, ministry transformation officers

name: Amortissement de la dette de l'Etat liee a la covid-19
description: Created to amortize EUR 165 billion of exceptional State debt from COVID-19 crisis over 20 years (2022-2042). Transferred to CADES; programme suppressed in LFI 2025.
beneficiaries: State debt management, CADES

name: Restitution des biens mal acquis
description: Channels proceeds from confiscated assets of foreign corrupt leaders (biens mal acquis) back to development projects in the countries of origin.
beneficiaries: Populations of countries affected by kleptocracy

name: France Televisions
description: Provides the annual State allocation to France Televisions (public TV: France 2, France 3, France 5, France Info), approximately EUR 2.5 billion. Successor to programme 841.
beneficiaries: France Televisions

name: ARTE France
description: Annual State allocation to ARTE France, the French-German cultural television channel, approximately EUR 300 million. Successor to programme 842.
beneficiaries: ARTE France

name: France Medias Monde
description: Annual State allocation to France Medias Monde (France 24, RFI, Monte Carlo Doualiya) for international broadcasting, approximately EUR 300 million. Successor to programme 844.
beneficiaries: France Medias Monde (France 24, RFI, MCD)

name: Institut national de l'audiovisuel
description: Annual State allocation to INA for preserving, digitizing, and commercializing France's audiovisual heritage archives (70+ years), approximately EUR 105 million.
beneficiaries: INA

name: TV5 Monde
description: France's contribution to TV5 Monde, the multilateral francophone television channel broadcasting in 200+ countries, approximately EUR 85 million.
beneficiaries: TV5 Monde

name: Reversement a la securite sociale des recettes de la FRR europeenne (Segur investissement)
description: Channels EU Recovery and Resilience Facility (FRR) proceeds to Social Security for health investment under the Segur de la sante hospital investment plan.
beneficiaries: Hospitals, Social Security (CNAM)

name: Fonds d'acceleration de la transition ecologique dans les territoires
description: Green Fund (Fonds vert) providing EUR 2.5 billion to local authorities for ecological transition projects: building renovation, mobility, biodiversity, and circular economy.
beneficiaries: Local authorities, intercommunal groupings, territorial projects

name: Allegements du cout du travail en agriculture (TODE-AG)
mission: Agriculture, alimentation, foret et affaires rurales
description: Compensates Social Security for employer social charge exemptions for seasonal agricultural workers (travailleurs occasionnels demandeurs d'emploi agricoles).
beneficiaries: Agricultural employers, seasonal workers

name: France services
description: France Services one-stop-shop network (2,700+ points). Functions absorbed into programme 354.
beneficiaries: Citizens in rural areas

name: Programme de transformation
description: Funds digital transformation and modernization projects across public audiovisual companies, including platform development and content innovation.
beneficiaries: Public audiovisual companies (France Televisions, Radio France, etc.)

name: Fonds de solidarite pour le developpement
description: Dedicated solidarity fund within ODA for contributions to global health (Global Fund, Gavi, Unitaid), education (GPE), and climate (GCF) initiatives.
beneficiaries: Global Fund, Gavi, Unitaid, GPE, developing countries

name: Soutien des progres de l'enseignement et de la recherche
description: France 2030 programme investing in higher education excellence (ExcellencES), university-industry partnerships, and research infrastructure upgrades.
beneficiaries: Universities, research laboratories, students in innovative programmes

name: Acceleration de la modernisation des entreprises
description: France 2030 programme accelerating industrial modernization through French Tech, industry 4.0, digital technology adoption, and business scale-up support.
beneficiaries: French Tech startups, industrial firms, BPI France

name: Financement des investissements strategiques
description: Core France 2030 programme (EUR 54 billion total plan) funding strategic investments: semiconductors, quantum computing, green hydrogen, nuclear, health innovation, and space.
beneficiaries: Strategic industries, deep tech firms, SGPI

name: Financement structurel des ecosystemes d'innovation
description: France 2030 programme funding structural support for innovation ecosystems: technology parks, incubators, competitiveness clusters (poles de competitivite), and innovation networks.
beneficiaries: Innovation ecosystems, competitiveness clusters, incubators

name: Presidence de la Republique
description: Funds the Presidency of the Republic (Elysee Palace operations, presidential staff, security, travel, and communications). Budget approximately EUR 115 million.
beneficiaries: President of the Republic, Elysee staff

name: Assemblee nationale
description: Funds the National Assembly (lower house, 577 deputies) including deputies' compensation, legislative staff, and Palais Bourbon operations. Budget approximately EUR 600 million.
beneficiaries: Deputies, National Assembly staff

name: Senat
description: Funds the Senate (upper house, 348 senators) including senators' compensation, legislative staff, and Palais du Luxembourg operations. Budget approximately EUR 350 million.
beneficiaries: Senators, Senate staff

name: Dotation en faveur des collectivites territoriales
description: Specific allocations for territorial equalization. Merged into programmes 119 and 122.
beneficiaries: Communes, departments, regions

name: Cour de justice de la Republique
description: Funds the special court responsible for trying government ministers for crimes committed in the exercise of their official functions.
beneficiaries: Cour de justice de la Republique

name: La Chaine parlementaire
description: Funds LCP (La Chaine parlementaire), the parliamentary television channel comprising LCP-AN (National Assembly) and Public Senat, broadcasting parliamentary proceedings.
beneficiaries: LCP-AN, Public Senat, viewers

name: Provision relative aux remunerations publiques
description: Provisioning envelope for future public sector wage increases decided during the budget year. Distributed to ministerial programmes upon government decision.
beneficiaries: Civil servants (when wage increases are decided)

name: Depenses accidentelles et imprevisibles
description: Reserve envelope for unforeseen and accidental expenditures that cannot be anticipated during budget preparation or covered by existing programme allocations.
beneficiaries: Government (as needed for emergencies)

name: Navigation aerienne
mission: Budget annexe - Controle et exploitation aeriens
description: Funds air traffic control services within the DGAC budgetary annex, managing en-route and approach control for 3 million annual flights over France.
beneficiaries: DSNA (air navigation), air traffic controllers, airlines

name: Transports aeriens, surveillance et certification
mission: Budget annexe - Controle et exploitation aeriens
description: Funds civil aviation oversight: airline and aircraft certification (OSAC), airport safety inspection, territorial air connectivity subsidies (OSP routes).
beneficiaries: Airlines, aircraft manufacturers, regional airports

name: Edition et diffusion
mission: Budget annexe - Publications officielles et information administrative
description: Funds the DILA (Direction de l'information legale et administrative) for publishing the Journal officiel, Legifrance, service-public.fr, and official government publications.
beneficiaries: DILA, Legifrance users, service-public.fr users

name: Pilotage et ressources humaines
mission: Budget annexe - Publications officielles et information administrative
description: HR management and administrative support for the DILA (Direction de l'information legale et administrative) budgetary annex operations.
beneficiaries: DILA staff

name: Contribution au desendettement de l'Etat
mission: CAS - Gestion du patrimoine immobilier de l'Etat
description: Real estate disposal proceeds allocated to State debt reduction. Unfunded since 2018.
beneficiaries: State debt management

name: Operations immobilieres et entretien des batiments de l'Etat
mission: CAS - Gestion du patrimoine immobilier de l'Etat
description: Funds structural real estate operations and maintenance on State buildings using proceeds from property disposals, managed by the Direction de l'immobilier de l'Etat.
beneficiaries: State building occupants, Direction de l'immobilier de l'Etat

name: Operations en capital interessant les participations financieres de l'Etat
description: Funds State equity operations managed by APE (Agence des participations): capital increases, acquisitions, and divestments in State-held companies (EDF, SNCF, Engie, etc.).
beneficiaries: APE, State-owned enterprises (EDF, SNCF, Orange, etc.)

name: Desendettement de l'Etat et d'etablissements publics de l'Etat
description: Allocates privatization and divestment proceeds to reduce State and public entity debt through the Caisse de la dette publique.
beneficiaries: Caisse de la dette publique, State balance sheet

name: Pensions civiles et militaires de retraite et allocations temporaires d'invalidite
description: Manages civil and military retirement pensions for 2.5 million State retirees, representing 95% of the CAS Pensions (EUR 66 billion in 2026). Funded by employer/employee contributions.
beneficiaries: Retired civil servants, retired military personnel

name: Ouvriers des etablissements industriels de l'Etat
description: Funds the FSPOEIE special pension scheme for workers in State industrial establishments (arsenals, military workshops) and work accident annuity fund.
beneficiaries: Retired State industrial workers, FSPOEIE

name: Pensions militaires d'invalidite et des victimes de guerre et autres pensions
description: Covers military disability pensions, war victims' pensions, Alsace-Moselle pensions, and other miscellaneous State pension obligations. A declining portfolio.
beneficiaries: Disabled military veterans, war victims

name: Structures et dispositifs de securite routiere
mission: CAS - Controle de la circulation et du stationnement routiers
description: Funds road safety infrastructure (automated speed cameras, radar deployment) and ANTAI (national agency for automated offence processing) from traffic fine revenue.
beneficiaries: ANTAI, road safety infrastructure

name: Contribution a l'equipement des collectivites - transports
mission: CAS - Controle de la circulation et du stationnement routiers
description: Traffic fine redistribution for local transport improvements. Merged into programme 754.
beneficiaries: Local authorities

name: Controle et modernisation de la politique de la circulation et du stationnement routiers
mission: CAS - Controle de la circulation et du stationnement routiers
description: Funds modernization of traffic control policy through technology upgrades, video enforcement, and administrative systems improvement.
beneficiaries: Traffic control authorities, road users

name: Contribution a l'equipement des collectivites territoriales pour l'amelioration des transports en commun, de la securite et de la circulation routieres
mission: CAS - Controle de la circulation et du stationnement routiers
description: Redistributes traffic fine revenue to local authorities for public transport improvements, road safety infrastructure, and traffic circulation projects.
beneficiaries: Local authorities, public transport networks

name: Desendettement de l'Etat
mission: CAS - Controle de la circulation et du stationnement routiers
description: Allocates a portion of traffic and parking fine revenue to State debt reduction.
beneficiaries: State debt management

name: Developpement et transfert en agriculture (former)
description: Former CASDAR programme. Renumbered as programme 775.
beneficiaries: Agricultural chambers

name: Recherche appliquee et innovation en agriculture (former)
description: Former CASDAR programme. Renumbered as programme 776.
beneficiaries: Agricultural technical institutes

name: Developpement et transfert en agriculture
description: Funds agricultural development and knowledge transfer through CASDAR (EUR 146 million), supporting chambers of agriculture (APCA), extension services, and farm advisory.
beneficiaries: Chambers of agriculture (APCA), ACTA, farmers

name: Recherche appliquee et innovation en agriculture
description: Funds applied agricultural research and innovation through CASDAR, including technical institutes (ACTA network), experimental stations, and agri-innovation projects.
beneficiaries: Agricultural technical institutes, INRAE partnerships, experimental farms

name: Electrification rurale
mission: CAS - Financement des aides aux collectivites pour l'electrification rurale
description: Provides FACE fund (Fonds d'amortissement des charges d'electrification) grants for rural electrification network improvements, extensions, and underground cabling.
beneficiaries: Rural communes, syndicats d'electrification, Enedis

name: Operations de maitrise de la demande d'electricite, de production d'electricite par des energies renouvelables ou de production de proximite dans les zones non interconnectees
mission: CAS - Financement des aides aux collectivites pour l'electrification rurale
description: Funds energy demand management, local renewable electricity production, and energy self-sufficiency projects in non-interconnected zones (overseas territories, islands).
beneficiaries: Non-interconnected territories (DOM-TOM), local renewable energy producers

name: Avances a l'Agence de services et de paiement, au titre du prefinancement des aides communautaires de la politique agricole commune
mission: CCF - Prets et avances a divers services de l'Etat ou organismes gerant des services publics
description: Provides advance payments to ASP for pre-financing EU CAP (Common Agricultural Policy) aid to farmers before EU reimbursement. Annual flow of EUR 9+ billion.
beneficiaries: ASP, French farmers receiving CAP payments (PAC)

name: Avances a des organismes distincts de l'Etat et gerant des services publics
mission: CCF - Prets et avances a divers services de l'Etat ou organismes gerant des services publics
description: Provides temporary State advances to public entities and organizations managing public services that face cash flow timing issues.
beneficiaries: Public entities with cash flow needs

name: Prets et avances a des services de l'Etat
mission: CCF - Prets et avances a divers services de l'Etat ou organismes gerant des services publics
description: Provides loans and advances to State services requiring temporary financing for specific operations or projects.
beneficiaries: State services

name: Avances a l'ONIAM au titre de l'indemnisation des victimes du Benfluorex
mission: CCF - Prets et avances a divers services de l'Etat ou organismes gerant des services publics
description: Provides advances to ONIAM (national medical accident compensation office) specifically for compensating victims of the Benfluorex (Mediator) pharmaceutical scandal.
beneficiaries: ONIAM, Mediator drug victims

name: Prets a FranceAgriMer au titre des prefinancements de fonds europeens
mission: CCF - Prets et avances a divers services de l'Etat ou organismes gerant des services publics
description: Provides loans to FranceAgriMer for pre-financing EU agricultural support funds (FEAGA, FEADER) pending European reimbursement.
beneficiaries: FranceAgriMer, agricultural beneficiaries of EU funds

name: Avances aux collectivites et etablissements publics, a la Nouvelle-Caledonie et aux collectivites regies par l'article 74 de la Constitution
description: Provides exceptional State advances to overseas collectivities (New Caledonia, Polynesia, Wallis-et-Futuna, Saint-Pierre-et-Miquelon) and public entities facing temporary difficulties.
beneficiaries: New Caledonia, French Polynesia, overseas collectivities

name: Avances sur le montant des impositions revenant aux regions, departements, communes, etablissements et divers organismes
description: Provides monthly advance payments on tax revenue allocated to 36,000+ local authorities, ensuring regular monthly cash flow before actual tax collections. The largest CCF programme.
beneficiaries: Regions, departments, communes, intercommunal groupings

name: France Televisions (former)
description: Former audiovisual advance for France Televisions (EUR 2.5 billion). Replaced by programme 372 in PLF 2025.
beneficiaries: France Televisions

name: ARTE France (former)
description: Former audiovisual advance for ARTE France (EUR 300M). Replaced by programme 373.
beneficiaries: ARTE France

name: Radio France (former)
description: Former audiovisual advance for Radio France (EUR 660M). Replaced by programme 374.
beneficiaries: Radio France

name: France Medias Monde (former)
description: Former audiovisual advance for France 24/RFI (EUR 300M). Replaced by programme 375.
beneficiaries: France Medias Monde

name: Institut national de l'audiovisuel (former)
description: Former audiovisual advance for INA (EUR 105M). Replaced by programme 376.
beneficiaries: INA

name: TV5 Monde (former)
description: Former audiovisual advance for TV5 Monde (EUR 85M). Replaced by programme 377.
beneficiaries: TV5 Monde

name: Prets du Tresor a des Etats etrangers en vue de faciliter la vente de biens et de services concourant au developpement du commerce exterieur de la France
mission: CCF - Prets a des Etats etrangers
description: Provides concessional Treasury loans (RPE) to foreign states to finance purchases of French goods and services, supporting French export competitiveness.
beneficiaries: Foreign states, French exporters

name: Prets a des Etats etrangers pour consolidation de dettes envers la France
mission: CCF - Prets a des Etats etrangers
description: Manages debt consolidation loans to foreign states restructuring bilateral debt to France under Paris Club multilateral debt relief frameworks.
beneficiaries: Indebted foreign states (Paris Club framework)

name: Prets a l'Agence francaise de developpement en vue de favoriser le developpement economique et social dans des Etats etrangers
mission: CCF - Prets a des Etats etrangers
description: Provides concessional State loans to AFD enabling it to grant soft loans to developing countries. Being phased down (EUR 145M in 2025 to EUR 90M by 2028).
beneficiaries: AFD, developing countries receiving concessional loans

name: Prets et avances pour le logement des agents de l'Etat
mission: CCF - Prets et avances a des particuliers ou a des organismes prives
description: Provides housing loans and advances to State employees for home purchase, particularly in high-cost housing areas (Ile-de-France, overseas).
beneficiaries: Civil servants seeking housing

name: Prets pour le developpement economique et social
mission: CCF - Prets et avances a des particuliers ou a des organismes prives
description: Provides State loans for economic and social development purposes to private individuals and organizations for specific public-interest projects.
beneficiaries: Private borrowers, economic development projects

name: Prets a la societe concessionnaire de la liaison express entre Paris et l'aeroport Paris-Charles de Gaulle
mission: CCF - Prets et avances a des particuliers ou a des organismes prives
description: Provides State loans to the CDG Express concession company for the direct rail link between Paris Gare de l'Est and Roissy-CDG airport.
beneficiaries: CDG Express concessionaire, air travelers

name: Avances a l'ASP - PAC (former)
mission: CCF - Avances a divers services de l'Etat
description: Former programme for CAP pre-financing advances. Renumbered as programme 821.
beneficiaries: ASP, French farmers

name: Avances a l'AGRASC
mission: CCF - Avances a divers services de l'Etat
description: Advances to AGRASC for managing criminally seized and confiscated assets.
beneficiaries: AGRASC, criminal justice system

name: Controle et exploitation aeriens
mission: Budget annexe - Controle et exploitation aeriens
description: Former single DGAC aviation programme. Split into programmes 612, 613, and 614.
beneficiaries: DGAC, airlines, airports

name: Remboursements et dégrèvements d'impôts d'État (crédits évaluatifs)
description: Covers all refunds, rebates, and tax relief on national/state-level taxes (income tax, corporate tax, VAT, etc.). This is a technical budget line reflecting amounts the state must return to taxpayers due to overpayments, tax credits, or legal adjustments rather than discretionary spending.
beneficiaries: All taxpayers (individuals and corporations) entitled to refunds or relief on state taxes

name: Avances aux collectivités territoriales et aux collectivités régies par les articles 73, 74 et 76 de la Constitution
description: Cash advances from the central government to local authorities (communes, departments, regions) and overseas collectivities governed by constitutional articles 73, 74 and 76. These advances smooth cash flow, as the state collects local taxes centrally before redistributing them.
beneficiaries: Local and regional governments, overseas territorial collectivities (DOM-TOM)

name: Remboursements et restitutions liés à la mécanique de l'impôt
description: Refunds and restitutions arising from the normal mechanics of the tax system, principally VAT input-tax credits that exceed output-tax liabilities. This is the largest sub-action within the tax refund mission.
beneficiaries: Businesses and individuals receiving mechanical tax refunds, especially VAT-registered companies

name: Taxe sur la valeur ajoutée
description: The VAT refund and relief component within the state tax refund mission. Covers reimbursements of VAT credits to businesses whose deductible input VAT exceeds their collected output VAT.
beneficiaries: VAT-registered businesses, especially exporters and capital-intensive firms with structural VAT credit positions

name: Fonctionnaires civils relevant du code des pensions civiles et militaires de retraite
description: Pension payments to retired civilian civil servants under the Civil and Military Pensions Code (Code des pensions civiles et militaires). This is the state's direct pension obligation for its former civilian employees, managed through the CAS Pensions account.
beneficiaries: Retired civilian civil servants of the French state and their survivors

name: Dette
description: Debt servicing costs of the French state, covering interest payments on government bonds (OATs and BTFs) and other sovereign debt instruments. Managed by the Agence France Trésor.
beneficiaries: Holders of French government debt (institutional investors, banks, foreign governments, retail investors)

name: Remboursements et dégrèvements liées à des politiques publiques
description: Tax refunds and relief specifically linked to deliberate public policy choices (e.g., tax credits for energy transition, employment incentives, R&D credits) as opposed to mechanical tax adjustments. Reflects the fiscal cost of tax expenditures.
beneficiaries: Taxpayers (individuals and firms) benefiting from policy-driven tax credits and incentives

name: Aides personnelles
description: Personal housing subsidies (APL, ALS, ALF) paid to tenants and homeowners to reduce their housing costs. Managed through the FNAL (Fonds national d'aide au logement) and distributed by CAFs.
beneficiaries: Low- and moderate-income tenants, students, and homeowners paying mortgages

name: Allocations et aides en faveur des personnes handicapées
description: Disability benefits including the Allocation aux Adultes Handicapés (AAH) and associated supplements. Provides a minimum income guarantee and additional support for people with disabilities who cannot fully support themselves through employment.
beneficiaries: Adults with disabilities (incapacity rate of 50% or above) and their households

name: Impôts sur les sociétés
description: Corporate income tax refund and relief component within the state tax refund mission. Covers CIR (research tax credit) reimbursements, CICE residual refunds, and other corporate tax overpayment restitutions.
beneficiaries: Corporations and businesses eligible for corporate tax refunds, especially those claiming R&D tax credits

name: Enseignement en collège
description: Funding for lower secondary education (collège, ages 11-15, grades 6e to 3e) within the national education system. Primarily covers teacher salaries and pedagogical costs for the roughly 7,000 public collèges.
beneficiaries: Students aged 11-15 in public lower secondary schools and their teaching staff

name: Remboursements et dégrèvements liés à la gestion des produits de l'Etat
description: Tax refunds and write-offs related to the administrative management of state revenue, including corrections of assessment errors, statute-of-limitations write-offs, and admissions en non-valeur (uncollectible debts).
beneficiaries: Taxpayers whose assessments are corrected; the state itself through clearing of uncollectible receivables

name: Enseignement élémentaire
description: Funding for elementary/primary education (ages 6-11, CP through CM2). Covers primarily teacher salaries in public primary schools across France.
beneficiaries: Students aged 6-11 in public elementary schools and their teaching staff

name: Impôt sur le revenu
description: Income tax refund and relief component within the state tax refund mission. Covers reimbursements of excess withholding, tax credits (emploi à domicile, transition énergétique, dons), and other personal income tax adjustments.
beneficiaries: Individual income taxpayers receiving refunds or benefiting from tax credits

name: Prime d'activité et autres dispositifs
description: The Prime d'activité (in-work benefit created in 2016, replacing the Prime pour l'emploi and RSA activité) and related employment incentive schemes. Provides an income supplement to low-wage workers to make work pay.
beneficiaries: Low-income workers (employees and self-employed) aged 18+ with earnings below a threshold

name: Militaires relevant du code des pensions civiles et militaires de retraite
description: Pension payments to retired military personnel under the Civil and Military Pensions Code. Covers all branches of the armed forces and is funded through the CAS Pensions special account.
beneficiaries: Retired military personnel of all branches and their survivors

name: Prêts et avances à divers services de l'État ou organismes gérant des services publics
description: Loans and cash advances from the Treasury to various state agencies and public service operators. These are repayable advances that help manage cash flow for entities delivering public services.
beneficiaries: State agencies, public establishments, and organisms managing public services

name: Avances à l'Agence de services et de paiement, au titre du préfinancement des aides communautaires de la politique agricole commune
description: Treasury advances to the ASP (Agence de services et de paiement) to pre-finance EU Common Agricultural Policy subsidies before reimbursement from the EU budget. Ensures French farmers receive CAP payments on time.
beneficiaries: French farmers and agricultural producers receiving CAP direct payments and rural development funds, via the ASP

name: Avances au titre du préfinancement des aides communautaires de la politique agricole commune
description: A broader envelope for Treasury advances to pre-finance EU Common Agricultural Policy payments. France advances funds to farmers pending EU reimbursement, given the scale of French agriculture within the CAP.
beneficiaries: French farmers, agricultural cooperatives, and rural development beneficiaries under the CAP

name: Enseignement général et technologique en lycée
description: Funding for general and technological upper secondary education (lycée, ages 15-18, classes de seconde to terminale). Covers teacher salaries and pedagogical costs for the baccalauréat général and technologique tracks.
beneficiaries: Students aged 15-18 in general and technological lycées, and their teaching staff

name: Préparation des forces terrestres - Personnel travaillant pour le programme "Préparation et emploi des forces"
description: Personnel costs for French Army ground forces attributed to the overarching 'Preparation and Employment of Forces' defense program. Covers salaries, allowances, and social charges for army soldiers and civilian staff.
beneficiaries: Active-duty French Army personnel and civilian defense employees assigned to ground forces

name: Ressources humaines des forces terrestres
description: Human resources management for French Army ground forces, encompassing recruitment, training, career management, pay, and conditions of service for army personnel.
beneficiaries: French Army soldiers and civilian personnel

name: Impôt sur les sociétés
description: A distinct corporate tax refund sub-action, likely covering a different category of IS reimbursements (e.g., policy-driven corporate tax credits as opposed to mechanical refunds) within the Remboursements et dégrèvements mission.
beneficiaries: Corporations benefiting from policy-driven corporate tax reliefs

name: Enseignement pré-élémentaire
description: Funding for pre-elementary (nursery/maternelle) education for children aged 3-6 (petite, moyenne, grande section). Since 2019, schooling is compulsory from age 3 in France, significantly expanding this line.
beneficiaries: Children aged 3-6 in public maternelle schools and their teaching staff

name: Engagement et combat
description: Operational engagement and combat capabilities of the French armed forces, covering the deployment of forces in external operations (OPEX), internal security operations (Sentinelle), and combat readiness.
beneficiaries: French armed forces personnel deployed in operations; national defense and security

name: Dissuasion
description: France's nuclear deterrence program, covering both the oceanic component (SNLE ballistic missile submarines) and the airborne component (ASMPA missiles on Rafale jets). One of the most protected budget lines in French defense.
beneficiaries: French strategic forces (Force océanique stratégique and Forces aériennes stratégiques); defense industrial base

name: Acomptes de crédits et de réductions d'impôts sur le revenu
description: Advance payments of income tax credits and reductions paid to taxpayers in January each year (since the 2019 prélèvement à la source reform). Covers 60% advances on recurring tax credits like emploi à domicile and dons.
beneficiaries: Individual income taxpayers who claimed tax credits in the prior year

name: Enseignement professionnel sous statut scolaire
description: Funding for vocational secondary education delivered in lycées professionnels under school-based status (as opposed to apprenticeship). Covers CAP, baccalauréat professionnel, and BTS preparation tracks.
beneficiaries: Students in vocational lycées (lycées professionnels) preparing professional qualifications

name: Désendettement de l'État ou d'établissements publics de l'État
description: Debt reduction for the state or its public establishments, funded primarily through privatization proceeds and exceptional revenues channeled through the CAS Participations financières de l'État.
beneficiaries: The French state and public establishments (reducing their debt burden)

name: Avances aux départements sur le produit de la taxe intérieure de consommation sur les produits énergétiques
description: Cash advances to départements from their share of the domestic consumption tax on energy products (TICPE). Departments receive a fraction of TICPE to compensate for transferred competences (RSA, roads), and these advances ensure timely payment.
beneficiaries: Departmental councils (conseils départementaux) receiving TICPE revenue transfers

name: Développement des compétences par l'alternance
description: Skills development through work-study alternance programs, primarily apprenticeship contracts. Covers state subsidies to training centers (CFA), employer incentives, and the overall apprenticeship ecosystem expansion.
beneficiaries: Apprentices, employers hiring apprentices, and Centres de Formation d'Apprentis (CFA)

name: Remboursements et dégrèvements d'impôts locaux (crédits évaluatifs)
description: Refunds and relief on local taxes (property taxes, former taxe d'habitation, CFE) that the state reimburses to local authorities. The state compensates local governments when it grants exemptions on their behalf.
beneficiaries: Taxpayers receiving local tax relief; local authorities compensated by the state

name: Augmentations de capital, dotations en fonds propres, avances d'actionnaire et prêts assimilés
description: Capital increases, equity endowments, shareholder advances, and quasi-equity loans to state-owned enterprises and public entities through the CAS Participations financières de l'État. The state's role as shareholder.
beneficiaries: State-owned enterprises (EDF, SNCF, La Poste, etc.) and strategic public entities

name: Recherche
description: Research funding within the higher education and research mission, covering grants to public research organizations (CNRS, INSERM, INRIA, CEA, etc.) and support for fundamental and applied research across disciplines.
beneficiaries: Public research organizations, university laboratories, and researchers

name: Soutien aux énergies renouvelables électriques en métropole continentale
description: Subsidies for renewable electricity generation in mainland France, covering feed-in tariffs and contracts for difference (complément de rémunération) for wind, solar, biomass, and other renewable sources. Previously funded through the CSPE.
beneficiaries: Renewable electricity producers (wind farms, solar parks, biomass plants) in metropolitan France

name: Ordre et sécurité publics
description: Public order and security operations of the Gendarmerie nationale, covering crowd control, rural policing, highway patrol, and territorial security across France's rural areas and small towns.
beneficiaries: French citizens in gendarmerie zones (rural and peri-urban areas); Gendarmerie personnel

name: Ordre et sécurité publics - hors administration centrale et cabinet
description: The field-operations portion of the Gendarmerie's public order and security mission, excluding central administration and ministerial cabinet costs. Reflects actual operational deployment in the territories.
beneficiaries: Gendarmerie operational units in the field; local populations served

name: Pilotage, administration et encadrement pédagogique
description: Administrative leadership and pedagogical supervision of the national education system, including rectorats, académies, school inspectors (IEN, IA-IPR), and pedagogical advisors who oversee teaching quality.
beneficiaries: School inspectors, academic administrators, and indirectly students and teachers through quality oversight

name: Sécurité et paix publiques
description: Day-to-day public safety and peace operations of the Police nationale, including patrol, neighborhood policing, crime prevention, and response to disturbances in urban areas.
beneficiaries: French citizens in police zones (urban areas); Police nationale personnel

name: Formation initiale et continue du baccalauréat à la licence
description: Initial and continuing higher education at the undergraduate level (bac to licence/bachelor's). Covers university operating costs, lecturer salaries, and pedagogical resources for licence programs.
beneficiaries: University students in licence (bachelor's) programs and university teaching staff

name: Actions pour favoriser la mise en activité professionnelle des demandeurs d'emploi
description: Employment activation measures to help jobseekers find work, including subsidized employment contracts (contrats aidés), professional integration programs, and support services operated through France Travail (formerly Pôle emploi).
beneficiaries: Unemployed jobseekers, especially long-term unemployed and those facing employment barriers

name: Sécurité et paix publiques - Hors administration centrale et cabinet
description: Field operations component of the Police nationale's public safety mission, excluding headquarters and ministerial cabinet costs. Represents the actual policing presence on the ground in urban zones.
beneficiaries: Police nationale operational units; urban populations served by local police commissariats

name: Préparation des forces navales
description: Preparation and readiness of French naval forces (Marine nationale), covering training, equipment maintenance, operational availability of surface ships, submarines, and naval aviation, and personnel readiness.
beneficiaries: French Navy personnel; naval operational readiness and fleet capability

name: Concours financiers aux collectivités territoriales et à leurs groupements
description: Financial grants from the state to local authorities and their groupings (intercommunalités), including components of the DGF (dotation globale de fonctionnement), DGE, DETR, and other equalization transfers.
beneficiaries: Communes, departments, regions, and intercommunal groupings (EPCIs)

name: Garde et contrôle des personnes placées sous main de justice
description: Custody and supervision of persons under judicial control, operated by the Direction de l'administration pénitentiaire. Covers prison operations, detention facility management, staffing, and security for approximately 75,000 inmates.
beneficiaries: Incarcerated persons; prison staff (surveillants pénitentiaires); the justice system

name: Préparation des forces aériennes
description: Preparation and readiness of the French Air and Space Force (Armée de l'air et de l'espace), covering pilot training, aircraft maintenance, air base operations, and personnel readiness.
beneficiaries: French Air and Space Force personnel; air operational capability

name: Aides aux employeurs d'apprentis
description: Financial incentives for employers hiring apprentices, including the aide unique aux employeurs d'apprentis (up to EUR 6,000 per apprentice since 2023). Massively expanded since the 2020 apprenticeship reform plan.
beneficiaries: Employers (especially SMEs) hiring apprentices under apprenticeship contracts

name: Taxe sur la valeur ajoutée - Dégrèvements et restitution de sommes indûment perçues
description: VAT-specific refunds for amounts unduly collected by the state, including corrections of erroneous assessments, litigation-related restitutions, and administrative relief on contested VAT amounts.
beneficiaries: Businesses and individuals receiving restitution of wrongly collected VAT

name: Régime de retraite du personnel de la SNCF
description: State subsidy to the special pension regime of SNCF (French national railway) workers. This regime is structurally in deficit due to a high retiree-to-active ratio, requiring substantial state transfers to remain solvent.
beneficiaries: Retired SNCF railway workers and their survivors

name: Conduite et pilotage des politiques de l'écologie, du développement et de la mobilité durables
description: Administrative leadership and support functions for the Ministry of Ecological Transition, covering staff costs, IT systems, real estate, and cross-cutting support for environmental, energy, and transport policies.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Ecological Transition staff and administrative operations

name: Commandement et maîtrise de l'information
description: Military command, control, communications, and intelligence (C3I) capabilities, including cyber defense, signals intelligence, satellite communications, and information systems for the armed forces.
beneficiaries: French armed forces command structures; military intelligence services (DRM, DGSE support)

name: Police judiciaire
description: Criminal investigation operations of the Gendarmerie nationale, including serious crime investigation, forensics, organized crime, cybercrime, and judicial police functions in gendarmerie zones.
beneficiaries: Gendarmerie criminal investigation units (sections de recherches); the justice system and crime victims

name: Commandement, ressources humaines et logistique
description: Command structure, human resources management, and logistics support for the Gendarmerie nationale, including recruitment, training (schools of gendarmerie), career management, and material support.
beneficiaries: Gendarmerie nationale personnel and administrative support functions

name: Ferroviaire
description: State funding for the rail transport sector, including contributions to SNCF Réseau for rail infrastructure maintenance and renewal, support for regional rail services (TER), and rail freight incentives.
beneficiaries: SNCF Réseau, regional rail operators, rail freight companies, and rail passengers

name: Police judiciaire - Hors administration centrale et cabinets
description: Field-level criminal investigation operations of the Gendarmerie, excluding central headquarters and cabinet costs. Represents the decentralized judicial police work across French territories.
beneficiaries: Gendarmerie field investigation units across departments and regions

name: Vie scolaire et éducation à la responsabilité
description: School life and citizenship education programs, including student supervision (CPE - conseillers principaux d'éducation, AED - assistants d'éducation), school climate initiatives, anti-bullying programs, and civic education.
beneficiaries: Secondary school students; conseillers principaux d'éducation and assistants d'éducation

name: Inclusion scolaire des élèves en situation de handicap
description: Inclusive education for students with disabilities, primarily funding AESH (Accompagnants des Élèves en Situation de Handicap) who provide individualized support. Also covers ULIS units and adapted pedagogical resources.
beneficiaries: Students with disabilities in mainstream schools; AESH support staff

name: Préparation des forces navales - Personnel travaillant pour le programme "Préparation et emploi des forces"
description: Personnel costs for French Navy forces attributed to the 'Preparation and Employment of Forces' defense program. Covers salaries and social charges for naval personnel (sailors, officers, and civilian staff).
beneficiaries: Active-duty French Navy personnel and civilian defense employees assigned to naval forces

name: Ressources humaines des forces navales
description: Human resources management for the French Navy, covering recruitment, training (École navale, specialist schools), career management, pay, and conditions of service for naval personnel.
beneficiaries: French Navy personnel (sailors, officers, and civilian staff)

name: Hébergement et logement adapté
description: Emergency and transitional housing for vulnerable populations, including CHRS (centres d'hébergement et de réinsertion sociale), emergency shelters, adapted housing (pensions de famille, résidences accueil), and the winter plan for homeless persons.
beneficiaries: Homeless persons, asylum seekers in emergency housing, and vulnerable populations in transitional accommodation

name: Préparation des forces aériennes - Personnel travaillant pour le programme "Préparation et emploi des forces"
description: Personnel costs for French Air and Space Force attributed to the 'Preparation and Employment of Forces' defense program. Covers salaries and social charges for air force personnel.
beneficiaries: Active-duty French Air and Space Force personnel and civilian defense employees

name: Ressources humaines des forces aériennes
description: Human resources management for the French Air and Space Force, including pilot and technician recruitment, training (École de l'air), career paths, and service conditions.
beneficiaries: French Air and Space Force personnel (pilots, technicians, officers, civilian staff)

name: Logistique et soutien interarmées
description: Joint logistics and support services across all branches of the French armed forces, including supply chains, maintenance, transport, medical support, and base infrastructure managed by the Service du commissariat des armées and other joint structures.
beneficiaries: All branches of the French armed forces; joint support commands

name: Logistique et soutien interarmées - Personnel travaillant pour le programme "Préparation et emploi des forces"
description: Personnel costs for joint logistics and support services attributed to the 'Preparation and Employment of Forces' defense program. Covers the workforce enabling cross-branch logistical operations.
beneficiaries: Military and civilian personnel in joint logistics and support roles

name: Solaire photovoltaïque
description: Support for solar photovoltaic electricity generation through feed-in tariffs and contracts for difference. Covers legacy high-tariff contracts from the 2006-2010 period and newer competitive auction-based support.
beneficiaries: Solar PV plant operators (utility-scale and rooftop installations)

name: Formation initiale et continue de niveau master
description: Initial and continuing higher education at the master's level. Covers university teaching costs, research-linked teaching, and pedagogical resources for master's degree programs across French universities.
beneficiaries: Master's degree students in public universities and university teaching/research staff

name: Maintien en condition opérationnelle du matériel des forces navales
description: Maintenance and operational readiness of French Navy equipment, including warship overhauls, submarine refits, naval aviation maintenance, and spare parts. A critical and growing budget line given fleet aging.
beneficiaries: French Navy operational capability; naval maintenance contractors (Naval Group, etc.)

name: Missions de police judiciaire et concours à la justice
description: Criminal investigation and judicial support missions of the Police nationale, including the Police judiciaire (PJ) directorates, crime scene forensics (police technique et scientifique), and cooperation with courts.
beneficiaries: Police nationale criminal investigation units; the judicial system and crime victims

name: Impôts sur le revenu - Dégrèvements et restitution de sommes indûment perçues
description: Income tax-specific refunds for amounts unduly collected, including corrections following audit disputes, litigation settlements, and administrative corrections of erroneous income tax assessments.
beneficiaries: Individual income taxpayers receiving restitution of erroneously collected amounts

name: Missions de police judiciaire et concours à la justice - hors administration centrale et cabinet
description: Field-level criminal investigation operations of the Police nationale, excluding Paris headquarters and ministerial cabinet. Represents the decentralized PJ operations across police zones.
beneficiaries: Police nationale field investigation units (SRPJ, antennes PJ) across the territory

name: Réglementation, politique technique et qualité de la construction
description: Building regulation, technical standards, and construction quality policies, including thermal regulation enforcement (RE2020), accessibility standards, construction permits processing, and housing quality improvement programs (ANAH subsidies).
beneficiaries: Homeowners, construction industry, social housing operators (via ANAH renovation subsidies)

name: Aides directes
description: Direct financial aid to individuals or households, typically within a social or housing policy context. May include direct subsidies for specific populations such as low-income households or those in precarious situations.
beneficiaries: Low-income households and individuals receiving direct state financial assistance

name: Enseignement post-baccalauréat en lycée
description: Post-baccalaureate education delivered within lycées, primarily BTS (Brevet de Technicien Supérieur) programs and CPGE (Classes Préparatoires aux Grandes Écoles). These are higher education tracks housed in secondary school infrastructure.
beneficiaries: Students in BTS and CPGE programs; lycée-based higher education teaching staff

name: Mesures pour favoriser le recrutement par des particuliers employeurs
description: Tax and social charge exemptions to encourage private individuals to hire household employees (cleaning, childcare, gardening, home care). Linked to the CESU system and the tax credit for emploi à domicile.
beneficiaries: Private household employers and their domestic employees; the CESU-registered home services sector

name: Préparation et conduite des opérations d'armement - Personnel travaillant pour le programme "Équipement des forces"
description: Personnel costs at the DGA (Direction Générale de l'Armement) for preparing and managing weapons procurement programs attributed to the 'Equipment of Forces' program. Covers engineers, program managers, and test personnel.
beneficiaries: DGA personnel (engineers, project managers, test pilots/technicians)

name: Soutien aux opérations d'armement
description: Support activities for weapons procurement operations, including DGA testing facilities, quality assurance, technical expertise, and infrastructure supporting the development and acquisition of military equipment.
beneficiaries: DGA support functions; defense procurement ecosystem

name: Entretien et équipements des forces aériennes
description: Maintenance and equipment for the French Air and Space Force, including aircraft maintenance (Rafale, A400M, Mirage 2000), spare parts procurement, and operational equipment for air bases.
beneficiaries: French Air and Space Force operational readiness; aerospace maintenance industry (Dassault, Safran, etc.)

name: Crédit d'impôt contemporain - Services aux particuliers
description: The contemporaneous (real-time) tax credit for personal services, introduced with the prélèvement à la source reform. Allows immediate 50% tax credit for home services rather than waiting for the annual tax settlement.
beneficiaries: Households employing home service workers (childcare, elderly care, cleaning, tutoring)

name: Accompagnement des personnes les plus éloignées du marché du travail - Fonds d'inclusion dans l'emploi
description: Support for people furthest from the labor market through the Employment Inclusion Fund, covering subsidized contracts (PEC - Parcours Emploi Compétences), insertion workshops, and specialized support for vulnerable jobseekers.
beneficiaries: Long-term unemployed, disabled workers, young people without qualifications, and other hard-to-employ populations

name: Besoins éducatifs particuliers
description: Special educational needs provision within the primary education sector, including RASED (Réseaux d'Aides Spécialisées aux Élèves en Difficulté), specialized teachers, school psychologists, and adapted instruction for students with learning difficulties.
beneficiaries: Primary school students with special educational needs; specialized teachers and school psychologists

name: Autres remboursements et dégrèvements liés à la gestion des produits de l'Etat - Admissions en non valeur - Créances liées aux impôts
description: Write-off of uncollectible tax debts (admissions en non-valeur) where collection has been deemed impossible due to debtor insolvency, disappearance, or expired statute of limitations. An accounting clean-up mechanism.
beneficiaries: The state's accounting system (clearing irrecoverable receivables); indirectly, insolvent debtors whose debts are extinguished

name: Remplacement
description: Substitute teacher deployment to cover teacher absences in primary and secondary schools. Funds the pool of replacement teachers (titulaires remplaçants and contractuels) who fill temporary vacancies.
beneficiaries: Students whose teachers are absent; replacement/substitute teachers

name: Préparation des forces terrestres
description: Non-personnel costs for French Army ground force preparation, covering equipment procurement, training exercises, operational readiness activities, and equipment modernization beyond what is captured in personnel lines.
beneficiaries: French Army units; ground force operational capability

name: Financement des structures de la formation professionnelle et de l'emploi
description: Funding for vocational training and employment service infrastructure, including France Travail (formerly Pôle emploi), Missions locales for youth employment, AFPA (national vocational training agency), and regional training organizations.
beneficiaries: France Travail, Missions locales, AFPA, and other employment/training service providers

name: Structures de mise en oeuvre de la politique de l'emploi
description: Operational structures implementing employment policy, including France Travail agencies, Missions locales, Maisons de l'emploi, and Cap emploi (for disabled workers). Covers their operating costs and staffing.
beneficiaries: Employment service operators and the jobseekers they serve

name: Fiscalité des particuliers et fiscalité directe locale
description: Tax relief measures related to individual taxation and local direct taxes, covering various exemptions, abatements, and credits granted to individuals on their income tax and local property/residence taxes.
beneficiaries: Individual taxpayers benefiting from personal tax and local tax relief measures

name: Taxes foncières
description: State-compensated relief on property taxes (taxe foncière sur les propriétés bâties and non bâties), including exemptions for elderly/disabled low-income property owners and capping mechanisms.
beneficiaries: Property owners receiving property tax exemptions or caps (elderly, disabled, low-income)

name: Prestations vieillesse et invalidité
description: Old-age and disability benefits paid by the state to its former employees or specific categories, including supplementary pensions, disability allowances, and survivor benefits outside the main pension code regime.
beneficiaries: State retirees receiving supplementary benefits; disabled former state employees

name: Industrialisation et déploiement
description: Industrialization and deployment phase of major defense equipment programs, covering the transition from development to serial production and fielding of weapons systems (e.g., Rafale, VBCI, FREMM frigates).
beneficiaries: Defense industrial base (Dassault, Naval Group, Nexter/KNDS, Thales); armed forces receiving new equipment

name: Autres impôts directs et taxes assimilées - Dégrèvements et restitution de sommes indûment perçues
description: Refunds and relief on other direct taxes and assimilated levies (beyond income tax and corporate tax), including wealth taxes, inheritance tax corrections, and other miscellaneous direct tax adjustments.
beneficiaries: Taxpayers receiving refunds on miscellaneous direct taxes

name: Financement du service public de l'emploi
description: Core funding for the public employment service, primarily France Travail (formerly Pôle emploi), covering its operational budget, staff costs, and IT infrastructure for managing jobseeker registration and placement services.
beneficiaries: France Travail (Pôle emploi) and its staff; jobseekers using public employment services

name: Frapper à distance - RAFALE
description: Procurement and upgrade of the Dassault Rafale multirole combat aircraft for stand-off strike capability. Covers new aircraft deliveries to reach the fleet target (225 aircraft) and F4/F5 standard upgrades.
beneficiaries: French Air and Space Force and Navy (Aéronavale) Rafale squadrons; Dassault Aviation

name: Soutien
description: General support and administrative functions for a ministry or defense program, covering cross-cutting activities like IT, facilities management, communications, legal affairs, and general administration.
beneficiaries: Administrative and support staff; the operational programs they enable

name: Soutien aux projets des communes et groupements de communes
description: State investment grants supporting capital projects by communes and intercommunal groupings, primarily through DETR (dotation d'équipement des territoires ruraux) and DSIL (dotation de soutien à l'investissement local).
beneficiaries: Communes and intercommunal groupings (EPCIs) undertaking infrastructure and public facility investments

name: Anciens combattants, mémoire et liens avec la Nation
description: Veterans affairs, remembrance, and links between the armed forces and society. Covers veterans' pensions, the ONACVG (Office national des anciens combattants), war memorials, and civic-military outreach programs.
beneficiaries: War veterans, their widows and orphans; remembrance organizations

name: Reconnaissance et réparation en faveur du monde combattant, mémoire et liens avec la Nation
description: Recognition and reparation for veterans, including military disability pensions (pensions militaires d'invalidité), the retraite du combattant, and special allocations. Also covers memory and commemoration activities.
beneficiaries: Disabled veterans, holders of the carte du combattant, and war widows/orphans

name: Ordre public et protection de la souveraineté
description: Public order maintenance and sovereignty protection by the Police nationale, including CRS (Compagnies Républicaines de Sécurité) riot units, VIP protection, counter-terrorism, and border security operations.
beneficiaries: CRS units, counter-terrorism services (RAID, DGSI), and border police; public safety

name: Indemnisation des demandeurs d'emploi
description: State contribution to unemployment compensation, including the ASS (Allocation de Solidarité Spécifique) for long-term unemployed who have exhausted their insurance-based rights, and other state-funded solidarity allowances.
beneficiaries: Long-term unemployed persons receiving solidarity-based unemployment benefits

name: Pilotage et support du programme
description: Program management and support functions providing administrative infrastructure, strategic steering, performance monitoring, and cross-cutting services for a specific ministry or budget program.
beneficiaries: Program managers and administrative staff; the operational actions they support

name: Assurer la crédibilité technique de la dissuasion - Autres opérations
description: Technical credibility of nuclear deterrence through CEA/DAM (military applications division) operations, including nuclear warhead simulation (Laser Mégajoule), maintenance of the arsenal, and supporting scientific activities.
beneficiaries: CEA/DAM (Commissariat à l'énergie atomique, Direction des applications militaires); nuclear deterrence capability

name: Ordre public et protection de la souveraineté - Hors administration centrale et cabinets
description: Field-level public order and sovereignty protection operations of the Police nationale, excluding central administration. Represents the deployed CRS, counter-terrorism, and border units across the territory.
beneficiaries: Police nationale field units for public order, counter-terrorism, and border security

name: Coopération bilatérale
description: Bilateral development cooperation, primarily French overseas development aid (APD) channeled through bilateral partnerships with developing countries, especially in francophone Africa. Includes AFD (Agence Française de Développement) programs.
beneficiaries: Developing countries (especially francophone Africa); AFD and French development cooperation agencies

name: Fiscalité des PME
description: Tax relief measures specifically targeting small and medium enterprises (PME), including reduced corporate tax rates for SMEs, special depreciation rules, and tax credits designed to support SME growth and investment.
beneficiaries: Small and medium enterprises (PME/TPE) benefiting from targeted tax incentives

name: Projection - mobilité - soutien
description: Military force projection, mobility, and support capabilities, covering strategic and tactical transport (A400M, C-130, NH90), aerial refueling, sealift, and the logistical support enabling expeditionary operations.
beneficiaries: French armed forces expeditionary capability; transport aircraft and ship fleets

name: Soutien aux entreprises
description: Business support programs including grants, subsidized loans, and technical assistance for enterprise development, competitiveness, and innovation. May include BPI France interventions and sectoral support schemes.
beneficiaries: French businesses, especially SMEs and startups, receiving state support for growth and innovation

name: Recherche dans les domaines de l'énergie, du développement et de la mobilité durables
description: Research in energy, sustainable development, and mobility, primarily through CEA (nuclear and renewable energy research), IFPEN (petroleum and new energies), IFREMER (ocean research), and Météo-France.
beneficiaries: CEA, IFPEN, IFREMER, Météo-France, and other public research bodies in energy/environment

name: Pilotage et encadrement pédagogique
description: Pedagogical leadership and supervision in a specific education program, covering school inspectors, pedagogical advisors, and academic coordination ensuring curriculum implementation and teaching quality.
beneficiaries: School inspectors, pedagogical advisors, and the education system they supervise

name: Conduite de la politique pénale et jugement des affaires pénales
description: Criminal prosecution and adjudication of criminal cases, covering the operations of criminal courts (tribunaux correctionnels, cours d'assises), prosecutors' offices (parquets), and the conduct of penal policy under the Ministry of Justice.
beneficiaries: The judiciary (prosecutors, judges, court staff); defendants and victims in criminal proceedings

name: Taxe intérieure de consommation sur les produits énergétiques
description: Refunds and exemptions on the domestic consumption tax on energy products (TICPE, the main fuel tax), including reduced rates for agriculture, road transport, and industrial uses of energy products.
beneficiaries: Farmers, road haulers, and industrial energy users benefiting from TICPE reduced rates or exemptions

name: Insertion par l'activité économique
description: Integration through economic activity (IAE), funding social enterprise structures that provide employment and support to persons excluded from the conventional labor market, including EI (entreprises d'insertion), ETTI, AI, and ACI.
beneficiaries: Social integration enterprises (SIAE) and their employees who are far from the labor market

name: Planification des moyens et conduite des opérations - Personnel travaillant pour le programme "Préparation et emploi des forces"
description: Personnel costs for strategic planning and operational command functions (État-major des armées) attributed to the 'Preparation and Employment of Forces' program. Covers staff officers and support personnel at joint command level.
beneficiaries: French joint military staff (EMA) personnel and operational command structures

name: Service du commissariat des armées
description: The Joint Defence Commissariat (SCA), created in 2010 by merging the three single-service commissariats. Provides administrative and logistical support (catering, clothing, pay, legal, general supply) across all armed forces branches.
beneficiaries: All branches of the French armed forces served by the SCA

name: Prospective de défense
description: Defense foresight and advanced research, including upstream R&D (études amont) managed by the DGA to prepare future weapons systems, technology demonstrators, and innovation partnerships with industry and academia.
beneficiaries: DGA research programs; defense industry R&D; academic defense research labs

name: Maintien en condition opérationnelle du matériel des forces terrestres
description: Maintenance and operational readiness of French Army equipment, including armored vehicles (Leclerc, VBCI, Griffon), helicopters (Tigre, NH90), artillery, and other ground forces materiel.
beneficiaries: French Army operational readiness; army maintenance units and defense contractors (Nexter/KNDS, Arquus)

name: Contribution économique territoriale et autres impôts économiques
description: Refunds and relief on the CET (contribution économique territoriale, which replaced the taxe professionnelle in 2010), comprising the CFE and CVAE, as well as other economic levies on businesses.
beneficiaries: Businesses benefiting from CET exemptions, caps, or refunds

name: Taxe professionnelle et contribution économique territoriale et autres impôts économiques créés ou modifiés dans le cadre de la réforme de la taxe professionnelle
description: Relief measures transitioning from the former taxe professionnelle to the CET system following the 2010 reform, including compensations to local authorities for lost revenue and transitional relief for affected businesses.
beneficiaries: Businesses affected by the TP-to-CET transition; local authorities compensated for revenue changes

name: Ressources humaines et management
description: Cross-cutting human resources and management functions for a major ministry, covering HR policy, training, social dialogue, workplace health, diversity initiatives, and workforce planning.
beneficiaries: Ministry employees benefiting from HR management, training, and social programs

name: Garantie de l'exercice du droit d'asile
description: Guaranteeing the right to asylum in France, covering the OFPRA (asylum determination), CNDA (appeals court), reception conditions for asylum seekers (hébergement, ADA - allocation pour demandeurs d'asile), and legal assistance.
beneficiaries: Asylum seekers in France; OFPRA and CNDA staff; reception center operators

name: Protection et sauvegarde
description: Protection and safeguarding missions of the armed forces on national territory, including POSTURE (air defense, maritime surveillance), participation in civil security (natural disasters), and critical infrastructure protection.
beneficiaries: French armed forces units on homeland defense missions; civil populations in emergency situations

name: Recherches scientifiques et technologiques en sciences de la vie et de la santé
description: Scientific and technological research in life sciences and health, primarily funding INSERM (Institut national de la santé et de la recherche médicale) and other public research organisms working on biomedical research.
beneficiaries: INSERM, Institut Pasteur, and other life science/health research organizations; researchers

name: Gestion financière du secteur public local hors fiscalité
description: Financial management of the local public sector excluding taxation, covering DGFIP services for local authority accounting, treasury operations, debt management, and financial advisory services to local governments.
beneficiaries: Local authorities receiving DGFIP accounting and financial management services

name: Traitement et jugement des contentieux civils
description: Processing and adjudication of civil disputes, covering the operations of civil courts (tribunaux judiciaires, cours d'appel) for family law, commercial disputes, labor cases, and other civil litigation.
beneficiaries: The civil judiciary (judges, clerks, court staff); civil litigants and parties in family, commercial, and other civil cases

name: Aide médicale de l'Etat
description: State Medical Aid (AME) providing healthcare coverage to undocumented immigrants residing in France for more than 3 months and below an income threshold. Covers hospital and outpatient care with some limitations.
beneficiaries: Undocumented immigrants in France meeting residency and income conditions

name: Exonérations liées à l'apprentissage
description: Social contribution exemptions linked to apprenticeship contracts, where the state compensates social security funds for reduced employer charges on apprentice wages to incentivize apprentice hiring.
beneficiaries: Employers hiring apprentices; social security funds compensated for lost revenue

name: Impôts sur les sociétés - Dégrèvements et restitution de sommes indûment perçues
description: Corporate tax-specific refunds for amounts unduly collected, including corrections of erroneous assessments, litigation-related restitutions, and administrative adjustments on contested corporate tax amounts.
beneficiaries: Corporations receiving restitution of erroneously collected corporate tax

name: Planification des moyens et conduite des opérations
description: Strategic planning and operational command by the État-major des armées (EMA), covering force planning, operational command of deployed forces (CPCO), intelligence coordination, and strategic decision-making for military operations.
beneficiaries: French joint military command (EMA/CPCO); all deployed military operations

name: Recherches scientifiques et technologiques dans le domaine de l'environnement
description: Scientific and technological research in environmental sciences, funding organizations like CNRS (environmental divisions), INRAE (agriculture and environment), IRD (development research), and BRGM (geological research).
beneficiaries: INRAE, CNRS, IRD, BRGM, and other environmental research organizations; researchers

name: Opérer en milieu hostile - SCORPION
description: The SCORPION program for French Army combat modernization, delivering a new generation of networked armored vehicles (Griffon, Jaguar, Serval) with integrated battle management systems (SICS) for operating in hostile environments.
beneficiaries: French Army combat units; Nexter/KNDS, Arquus, and Thales (industrial prime contractors)

name: Immobilier
description: Defense real estate and infrastructure, covering construction, renovation, and maintenance of military bases, barracks, training facilities, and other defense installations across France and overseas territories.
beneficiaries: French armed forces (all branches); military base communities; construction contractors

name: Police des étrangers et sûreté des transports internationaux
description: Immigration policing and international transport security by the Police nationale (PAF - Police aux Frontières), covering border controls, document verification, removal of irregular migrants, and airport/port security.
beneficiaries: PAF (border police) units; international transport operators and travelers

name: Industrie et services
description: Support for industry and services sectors, including subsidies for industrial competitiveness, digital transformation, strategic sectors support (automotive, aerospace), and service sector modernization programs.
beneficiaries: Industrial and service sector companies receiving state support for competitiveness and modernization

name: Avances aux départements sur les frais de gestion de la taxe foncière sur les propriétés bâties
description: Advances to departments on property tax (taxe foncière) management fees, introduced following the transfer of the taxe foncière share from communes to departments as part of the suppression of the taxe d'habitation.
beneficiaries: Departmental councils (conseils départementaux) receiving property tax management fee transfers

name: Soutien à l'injection de biométhane
description: Subsidies for biomethane injection into the natural gas grid, through feed-in tariffs guaranteeing a purchase price for biogas producers who upgrade biogas to biomethane quality and inject it into the gas network.
beneficiaries: Biomethane producers (agricultural digesters, waste treatment plants) injecting into the gas grid

name: Autres actions relatives à la police des étrangers et à la sureté des transports internationaux - Hors administration centrale et cabinets
description: Field-level immigration policing and transport security operations excluding central administration, covering PAF units at borders, airports, ports, and train stations across the territory.
beneficiaries: PAF field units; border crossings, airports, and international transport hubs

name: Formation professionnelle des demandeurs d'emploi
description: Vocational training for unemployed jobseekers, funding training programs to help the unemployed acquire new skills or qualifications aligned with labor market needs. Includes POEI, AFPR, and regional training programs.
beneficiaries: Unemployed jobseekers enrolled in vocational training; training providers

name: Accueil et accompagnement des personnes placées sous main de justice
