description: Reception and support for persons under judicial supervision, covering probation and reintegration services (SPIP - services pénitentiaires d'insertion et de probation), community service supervision, and post-release support.
beneficiaries: Probationers, parolees, and persons on community sentences; SPIP probation officers

name: Formation des demandeurs d'emploi aux métiers recrutant sur le marché du travail
description: Training unemployed jobseekers specifically for occupations with active hiring demand in the labor market, targeting skills gaps and bottleneck professions (métiers en tension) such as healthcare, construction, IT, and hospitality.
beneficiaries: Unemployed persons training for in-demand occupations; employers in shortage sectors

name: Soutien des forces par les bases de défense
description: Support to armed forces through Bases de Défense (BdD), the joint military base management structures created in 2011 to mutualize administrative and logistical support (catering, accommodation, transport, facilities) across all services at the local level.
beneficiaries: All military units supported by the 51 Bases de Défense across France; BdD civilian and military support staff

name: Moyens généraux et d'appui à la recherche
description: General resources and support services for public research organizations, covering shared infrastructure, administrative costs, and cross-cutting support functions for national research bodies.
beneficiaries: CNRS, INSERM, and other national research organizations

name: Fonds d'accélération de la transition écologique dans les territoires
description: Fund to accelerate ecological transition at the local level, financing green infrastructure projects, energy renovation, and environmental adaptation measures proposed by local authorities.
beneficiaries: Communes, departments, and regions implementing ecological transition projects

name: Recherches scientifiques et technologiques en sciences et techniques de l'information
description: Funds scientific and technological research in information sciences and technology, including computer science, digital technologies, telecommunications, and data science.
beneficiaries: INRIA, CNRS laboratories, and public research institutes in IT and digital sciences

name: Avances aux régions sur les frais de gestion de la CFE, CVAE et TICPE
description: Treasury advances to regions covering management fees related to the collection of corporate land tax (CFE), value-added contribution of enterprises (CVAE), and domestic consumption tax on energy products (TICPE).
beneficiaries: Regional governments (conseils régionaux)

name: Agence nationale de la recherche
description: Funding for the French National Research Agency, which provides competitive project-based grants to public and private research teams across all scientific disciplines.
beneficiaries: Public research labs, universities, and private-sector R&D partnerships

name: Action sociale
description: Social welfare programs for state employees including childcare subsidies, housing assistance, meal vouchers, holiday aid, and support for employees facing hardship.
beneficiaries: Civil servants and public-sector employees

name: Régimes de retraite des mines, de la SEITA, et divers
description: State subsidies to balance special pension regimes for former mining workers, former SEITA (state tobacco monopoly) employees, and other legacy public-sector retirement schemes.
beneficiaries: Retired miners, former SEITA employees, and other legacy regime pensioners

name: Etudes amont
description: Upstream defense research and technology studies, funding early-stage R&D for future military capabilities before they enter the armament program phase.
beneficiaries: DGA (Direction générale de l'armement), defense industry firms, and research labs

name: Aide économique et financière multilatérale
description: French contributions to multilateral economic and financial institutions including the World Bank, IMF, regional development banks, and international economic cooperation funds.
beneficiaries: International financial institutions and developing countries

name: Fonction santé (defense)
description: Military health service (Service de santé des armées), covering military hospitals, field medical support, health research for armed forces, and medical training.
beneficiaries: Military personnel and their families, military health professionals

name: Formation des personnels enseignants
description: Initial and continuing training of primary and secondary school teachers, including pedagogical preparation, subject-matter training, and professional development through INSPé (teacher training institutes).
beneficiaries: Trainee teachers, in-service teachers, and INSPé institutes

name: Conduite et pilotage des politiques économiques et financières
description: Central management and steering of economic and financial policies, covering the administrative support functions of the Ministry of Economy and Finance including HR, IT, logistics, and strategic planning.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Economy and Finance central services

name: Insertion des jeunes sur le marché du travail - Contrat d'engagement jeunes (CEJ)
description: Youth employment insertion program replacing the Garantie Jeunes, providing intensive coaching and a monthly allowance to young people aged 16-25 who are neither in employment, education, nor training (NEET).
beneficiaries: Young people aged 16-25 not in employment, education, or training

name: Aides à l'acquisition de véhicules propres
description: Financial incentives (bonus-malus, conversion premiums) for purchasing low-emission or zero-emission vehicles, encouraging the transition from polluting cars to electric and hybrid alternatives.
beneficiaries: Individuals and businesses purchasing clean vehicles

name: Assurer la crédibilité opérationnelle de la dissuasion - soutien et mise en oeuvre des forces
description: Operational support and force deployment for France's nuclear deterrence, covering readiness of submarine-launched and airborne nuclear forces, maintenance, and exercises.
beneficiaries: Strategic Air Forces, submarine-based nuclear forces, and support units

name: Mise en oeuvre des décisions judiciaires
description: Implementation of judicial decisions, covering the prison administration (penitentiary services), probation services, electronic monitoring, and post-sentencing enforcement.
beneficiaries: Prison administration, probation officers, and persons under judicial supervision

name: Dotation générale de décentralisation des régions
description: General decentralization grant to regions, compensating for competences transferred from the state to regional governments under decentralization laws.
beneficiaries: Regional councils (conseils régionaux)

name: Service du commissariat aux armées
description: Joint military commissariat service providing logistical, administrative, and supply-chain support to the armed forces including food services, clothing, transport, and general supplies.
beneficiaries: All branches of the French armed forces

name: Soutien au déploiement
description: Support for the deployment of digital and administrative transformation projects across government, including IT infrastructure rollout and modernization programs.
beneficiaries: Government agencies undergoing digital transformation

name: Pilotage, support, audit et évaluations
description: Central steering, administrative support, internal audit, and policy evaluation functions within the Ministry of Social Affairs, covering cross-cutting management tasks.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Social Affairs and Health central administration

name: Gestion financière de l'État hors fiscalité
description: State financial management operations outside of taxation, including public accounting, treasury operations, management of public deposits, and financial control of public expenditure.
beneficiaries: Direction générale des Finances publiques (DGFiP), public accountants

name: Agence de l'environnement et de la maîtrise de l'énergie (ADEME)
description: Subsidy to ADEME, the French Agency for Ecological Transition, funding programs in waste management, energy efficiency, renewable energy, air quality, soil remediation, and circular economy.
beneficiaries: Local authorities, businesses, and households via ADEME programs

name: Régime de retraite du personnel de la RATP
description: State subsidy to balance the special pension regime for employees of Paris public transport operator RATP, ensuring long-term solvency of the retirement scheme.
beneficiaries: Current and retired RATP employees

name: Autres remboursements et dégrèvements liés à la gestion des produits de l'Etat
description: Miscellaneous tax refunds and rebates related to state revenue management, including corrections, adjustments, and administrative refunds outside the main tax categories.
beneficiaries: Taxpayers entitled to refunds or rebates

name: Recherches scientifiques et technologiques dans le domaine de l'énergie
description: Public research funding for energy sciences and technologies, including nuclear energy, renewables, energy storage, hydrogen, and energy efficiency.
beneficiaries: CEA, IFPEN, CNRS energy labs, and research partnerships

name: Protection juridique des majeurs
description: Legal protection services for vulnerable adults (guardianship, curatorship, judicial safeguards), funding professional guardians and the court-mandated protection system.
beneficiaries: Vulnerable adults under legal protection and professional guardians (mandataires judiciaires)

name: Assurer la crédibilité technique de la dissuasion M51
description: Development, production, and maintenance of the M51 submarine-launched ballistic missile, the primary delivery system for France's sea-based nuclear deterrent.
beneficiaries: French Navy, DGA, and defense contractors (ArianeGroup)

name: Versements au fonds spécial de retraite de la CANSSM
description: State contributions to the special retirement fund of the autonomous national social security fund for mines, covering pension obligations for former mining sector workers.
beneficiaries: Retired and former mining industry workers

name: Mise en oeuvre de l'enseignement dans les établissements publics
description: Delivery of education in public secondary schools, covering teacher salaries, pedagogical resources, and operational costs of public collèges and lycées.
beneficiaries: Students and teachers in public secondary education

name: Exonérations TEPA
description: Tax exemptions introduced by the TEPA law (Travail, Emploi, Pouvoir d'Achat) covering overtime pay exemptions from income tax and social contributions.
beneficiaries: Employees working overtime hours

name: Politique des ressources humaines
description: Human resources policy for the Ministry of Defense, covering recruitment, career management, training, social dialogue, and working conditions for civilian and military personnel.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Defense civilian and military staff

name: Fonctions de soutien du ministère
description: Cross-cutting support functions of the Ministry of Justice including HR management, IT systems, budget execution, legal affairs, and general administration.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Justice central and deconcentrated services

name: Dispositifs mis en œuvre pour l'emploi des jeunes par le service public de l'emploi
description: Youth employment schemes administered by the public employment service (Pôle emploi/France Travail), including counseling, job placement, and specific integration measures for young jobseekers.
beneficiaries: Young jobseekers aged 16-25

name: Logistique, système d'information, immobilier
description: Logistics, IT systems, and real estate management for the Ministry of Interior, covering building maintenance, information systems, fleet management, and shared services.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Interior services and police/gendarmerie facilities

name: Politique immobilière
description: State real estate policy covering the rationalization, maintenance, and management of government-owned buildings, including renovation, energy efficiency improvements, and strategic asset management.
beneficiaries: Government departments occupying state-owned properties

name: Soutien à la création, à la production et à la diffusion du spectacle vivant
description: Support for the creation, production, and distribution of live performing arts including theater, dance, music, circus, and street arts, funding national venues, companies, and festivals.
beneficiaries: Performing arts companies, national theaters, festivals, and independent artists

name: Reconnaissance envers le monde combattant
description: Recognition and benefits for veterans and war victims, covering military disability pensions, the reversion pension for widows, and various entitlements acknowledging military service.
beneficiaries: Veterans, war invalids, war widows, and orphans

name: PMI, droits et soutien aux invalides
description: Military disability pensions (Pensions Militaires d'Invalidité), rights, and support services for disabled veterans and war victims, including medical care and social assistance.
beneficiaries: Disabled veterans and civilian war victims

name: Sécurité routière
description: Road safety policy including regulation, awareness campaigns, driver licensing, vehicle certification, and coordination of road safety measures across government agencies.
beneficiaries: Road users, driving schools, and local road safety stakeholders

name: Accélération de la croissance (fonds propres)
description: Equity investments through the France 2030 investment plan to accelerate growth in strategic sectors including deeptech, health, energy, and advanced manufacturing.
beneficiaries: Innovative startups and growth-stage companies in strategic sectors

name: Sécurité routière - hors administration centrale et cabinet
description: Road safety operations outside central administration, covering local implementation of road safety measures, speed enforcement, infrastructure improvements, and accident prevention at the territorial level.
beneficiaries: Departmental and local road safety offices and road users

name: Pilotage territorial des politiques gouvernementales
description: Territorial steering of government policies by prefectures and sub-prefectures, coordinating interministerial action at the departmental and regional level.
beneficiaries: Prefectures, sub-prefectures, and local government partners

name: Formation des personnels enseignants et d'orientation
description: Training of teaching staff and educational guidance counselors in secondary education, covering initial preparation and continuing professional development.
beneficiaries: Secondary school teachers and guidance counselors (conseillers d'orientation)

name: Charges nucléaires de long terme des installations du CEA
description: Long-term nuclear liabilities of CEA facilities, covering decommissioning costs, nuclear waste management, and environmental remediation of atomic energy commission sites.
beneficiaries: CEA (Commissariat à l'énergie atomique) and affected communities

name: Réseau diplomatique
description: France's diplomatic network of embassies, consulates, and permanent representations abroad, covering operational costs, personnel, security, and building maintenance of diplomatic posts worldwide.
beneficiaries: French embassies, consulates, and diplomatic staff

name: Régimes de retraite et de sécurité sociale des marins (1)
description: Special pension and social security regime for maritime workers (ENIM), covering retirement pensions, health insurance, and occupational accident benefits for seafarers.
beneficiaries: Active and retired sailors, fishermen, and merchant marine workers

name: Régimes de retraite et de sécurité sociale des marins (2)
description: Continuation of state subsidies to the special social security regime for maritime workers ensuring the financial balance of ENIM pension and health coverage funds.
beneficiaries: Active and retired sailors, fishermen, and merchant marine workers

name: Financement structurel des écosystèmes d'innovation
description: Structural funding for innovation ecosystems including technology transfer offices, incubators, accelerators, competitiveness clusters (pôles de compétitivité), and innovation support networks.
beneficiaries: Innovation clusters, incubators, technology transfer organizations, and startups

name: Contribution à l'équipement des collectivités territoriales pour les transports en commun (1)
description: Capital grants to local authorities for improving public transport infrastructure, road safety equipment, and traffic management systems.
beneficiaries: Municipalities and intercommunal bodies investing in public transport

name: Contribution à l'équipement des collectivités territoriales pour les transports en commun (2)
description: Additional allocation for local authority transport, safety, and road infrastructure equipment, complementing the main grant program.
beneficiaries: Municipalities and intercommunal bodies investing in transport infrastructure

name: État-major et services centraux
description: General staff and central services of the Ministry of Defense, covering strategic planning, interservice coordination, central administration, and ministerial support functions.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Defense general staff, directorates, and central services

name: Prêts du Trésor à des États étrangers (commerce extérieur) (1)
description: Treasury loans to foreign governments to facilitate the sale of French goods and services abroad, supporting French export competitiveness in strategic markets.
beneficiaries: Foreign governments and French exporters of capital goods and services

name: Prêts à des États étrangers (commerce extérieur) (2)
description: Additional line for concessional loans to foreign states aimed at promoting French foreign trade, particularly in infrastructure, defense, and industrial equipment.
beneficiaries: Foreign governments and French companies in international trade

name: Soutien (autres dépenses)
description: Miscellaneous support expenditures covering cross-cutting operational costs that do not fall under specific program actions, including general administration overhead.
beneficiaries: Various government departments requiring cross-cutting support

name: Assurer la crédibilité technique de la dissuasion - SNLE 3G
description: Development of the third-generation nuclear-powered ballistic missile submarine (SNLE 3G) to replace the current Triomphant-class submarines as the backbone of France's sea-based nuclear deterrent.
beneficiaries: French Navy, DGA, Naval Group, and defense supply chain

name: Fonds de solidarité pour le développement (1)
description: Development solidarity fund financed by the tax on airline tickets and financial transaction tax, channeled primarily through multilateral health and climate initiatives (Global Fund, UNITAID).
beneficiaries: Developing countries via multilateral development and health organizations

name: Fonds de solidarité pour le développement (2)
description: Additional allocation to the development solidarity fund supporting international initiatives against pandemics, climate change, and poverty in developing nations.
beneficiaries: International development organizations and beneficiary countries

name: Développement des postes, des télécommunications et du numérique
description: Development of postal services, telecommunications, and digital infrastructure including broadband deployment, digital inclusion programs, and postal service modernization.
beneficiaries: La Poste, telecom operators, and rural/underserved communities

name: Fonctionnement des établissements
description: Operating costs of public higher education establishments including universities, covering non-personnel expenses such as utilities, maintenance, equipment, and teaching materials.
beneficiaries: Public universities and higher education institutions

name: Recherche et exploitation du renseignement intéressant la sécurité de la France - Personnel
description: Personnel costs for the DGSE (General Directorate for External Security) staff working on intelligence collection and analysis relevant to France's national security.
beneficiaries: DGSE intelligence personnel

name: Santé scolaire
description: School health services providing medical examinations, health screenings, vaccination follow-up, psychological support, and health education to pupils in primary and secondary schools.
beneficiaries: Students in public schools, school nurses, and school physicians

name: Mise en oeuvre des enseignements dans les établissements privés
description: State funding for teaching in private schools under contract (sous contrat), covering teacher salaries in private institutions that follow the national curriculum.
beneficiaries: Teachers and students in private schools under state contract

name: Assurer la crédibilité technique de la dissuasion - Simulation
description: Nuclear weapons simulation program replacing live nuclear testing, using supercomputers (TERA), laser facilities (LMJ), and radiographic installations to maintain warhead reliability.
beneficiaries: CEA-DAM (military applications division), defense research labs

name: Enregistrement, timbre, autres contributions - dégrèvements
description: Tax rebates and refunds on registration duties, stamp duties, and miscellaneous indirect taxes, including correction of amounts unduly collected by the state.
beneficiaries: Taxpayers entitled to refunds on registration and stamp duties

name: Personnels œuvrant pour les politiques d'urbanisme, territoires et habitat
description: Personnel costs for civil servants implementing urban planning, territorial development, and housing policies in decentralized ministry offices.
beneficiaries: Ministry staff in DDT(M) offices working on urban planning and housing

name: Charge de la dette de SNCF Réseau reprise par l'État (1)
description: State assumption of SNCF Réseau's historical debt service, following the 2020 rail reform that transferred EUR 25 billion of railway network debt to the state budget.
beneficiaries: SNCF Réseau (national railway infrastructure manager)

name: Charge de la dette de SNCF Réseau reprise par l'État (2)
description: Continued debt service payments on the portion of SNCF Réseau's legacy debt assumed by the French state to restore the rail infrastructure manager's financial health.
beneficiaries: SNCF Réseau and bondholders of transferred debt

name: Financement des entreprises et industrie
description: Investment and support for enterprise financing and industrial development through France 2030 and PIA programs, targeting strategic industrial sectors and SME growth.
beneficiaries: Industrial SMEs, mid-cap companies, and strategic sector enterprises

name: Fonctionnement courant de l'administration territoriale
description: Day-to-day operating costs of territorial state administration (prefectures and sub-prefectures), including utilities, maintenance, supplies, and IT infrastructure.
beneficiaries: Prefectures, sub-prefectures, and their staff

name: Trésorerie
description: State treasury operations covering cash management, public deposit administration, local government financial services, and the management of consignments and regulated savings.
beneficiaries: Direction générale des Finances publiques, local authorities using treasury services

name: Réparation
description: War reparation pensions and benefits for veterans and civilian war victims, including disability compensation, widows' pensions, and specific allowances for former combatants.
beneficiaries: War veterans, disabled ex-service members, and civilian war victims

name: PMI et allocations rattachées
description: Military invalidity pensions and associated allowances, covering core disability pension payments and supplementary benefits for severely disabled veterans.
beneficiaries: Disabled veterans receiving military invalidity pensions

name: Aide juridictionnelle
description: Legal aid system providing state-funded access to justice for individuals who cannot afford legal representation, covering lawyer fees and court costs for eligible litigants.
beneficiaries: Low-income individuals and legal aid lawyers (avocats)

name: Contributions internationales
description: France's assessed and voluntary contributions to international organizations including the UN system, NATO, OECD, Council of Europe, and other multilateral bodies.
beneficiaries: International organizations (UN, NATO, OECD, etc.)

name: Maîtrise de l'accès à l'espace
description: French and European space access programs, including contributions to ESA launcher programs (Ariane) and national efforts to maintain autonomous access to space.
beneficiaries: CNES, ESA, ArianeGroup, and the European space industry

name: Affaires immobilières (defense)
description: Defense real estate management covering military base infrastructure, land acquisitions, building construction and renovation, and environmental remediation of military sites.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Defense infrastructure services and military installations

name: Aide économique et financière bilatérale
description: Bilateral economic and financial aid to developing countries through concessional loans, debt relief, budget support, and technical assistance programs.
beneficiaries: Partner developing countries and French development agencies

name: Emploi des forces
description: Deployment and operational employment of French armed forces in domestic and overseas operations, including operational readiness, training exercises, and force projection.
beneficiaries: French Army, Navy, Air Force, and joint operational commands

name: Financement des agences régionales de santé
description: State funding for Regional Health Agencies (ARS) responsible for coordinating health policy at the regional level, including hospital planning, public health, and health crisis management.
beneficiaries: Agences régionales de santé (ARS) and regional health systems

name: Accompagnement transition énergétique
description: Support measures accompanying the energy transition, including subsidies for renewable energy development, energy efficiency programs, and industrial decarbonization assistance.
beneficiaries: Businesses, households, and local authorities undertaking energy transition projects

name: Définition et mise en oeuvre de la politique économique et financière
description: Design and implementation of France's economic and financial policy at national, European, and international levels, including economic analysis, forecasting, and policy coordination.
beneficiaries: Direction générale du Trésor and economic policy services

name: Personnels œuvrant pour les politiques de transport
description: Personnel costs for civil servants implementing transport policies in regional and departmental directorates (DREAL, DDT), covering roads, rail, maritime, and air transport oversight.
beneficiaries: Ministry staff working on transport policy in decentralized offices

name: Développement du service civique
description: Development of the civic service program offering young people aged 16-25 voluntary engagement missions of 6-12 months in areas of public interest (solidarity, education, environment, health).
beneficiaries: Young volunteers aged 16-25 and host organizations (nonprofits, public bodies)

name: Surveillance douanière des flux de personnes et de marchandises
description: Customs surveillance of cross-border movements of persons and goods, including anti-smuggling operations, counter-narcotics, and combating large-scale customs fraud.
beneficiaries: Direction générale des Douanes et Droits indirects (DGDDI)

name: Eolien en mer
description: Subsidies for offshore wind energy development through feed-in tariffs and contracts for difference, supporting France's offshore wind farm program.
beneficiaries: Offshore wind farm developers and operators

name: Soutien à la cogénération au gaz naturel et autres moyens thermiques (1)
description: Purchase obligation subsidies for combined heat and power (CHP) plants using natural gas and other thermal sources, supporting energy efficiency through cogeneration.
beneficiaries: Industrial and municipal CHP plant operators

name: Soutien à la cogénération au gaz naturel et autres moyens thermiques (2)
description: Continued support for natural gas cogeneration contracts and other thermal generation under legacy obligation purchase agreements.
beneficiaries: CHP plant operators under existing contracts

name: Renseignement extérieur (1)
description: Operational budget for the DGSE (Direction générale de la sécurité extérieure), France's foreign intelligence service, covering intelligence collection, counterterrorism, and counterproliferation.
beneficiaries: DGSE and national security apparatus

name: Coopération multilatérale
description: French contributions to multilateral development cooperation, including voluntary funding for UN agencies, global health funds, education programs, and multilateral humanitarian organizations.
beneficiaries: UN agencies, multilateral development organizations, and beneficiary countries

name: Surcoûts liés aux opérations extérieures (1)
description: Additional costs incurred from external military operations (OPEX), covering deployment expenses, force projection, equipment wear, and personnel allowances beyond normal peacetime budgets.
beneficiaries: French armed forces deployed in external operations

name: Bio-énergies
description: Subsidies for bioenergy production including biogas, biomass electricity, and biofuels under feed-in tariffs and obligation purchase contracts.
beneficiaries: Biogas plant operators, biomass producers, and biofuel manufacturers

name: Performance environnementale
description: France 2030 investments to improve environmental performance of industrial processes, support green manufacturing, and develop clean production technologies.
beneficiaries: Industrial companies investing in environmental performance improvements

name: Systèmes d'information et de communication (defense 1)
description: Defense information and communication systems covering the design, deployment, and maintenance of military IT networks, secure communications, and command-and-control infrastructure.
beneficiaries: Armed forces, DGA, and defense IT service providers

name: Assurer la crédibilité technique de la posture - toutes opérations
description: Maintaining the technical credibility of France's overall deterrence posture across all operations, covering nuclear force readiness, testing, and technical certification.
beneficiaries: Strategic forces command and nuclear weapons complex

name: Commandement et activités des forces navales
description: Command structure and operational activities of the French Navy, including fleet operations, naval exercises, maritime patrols, and port operations.
beneficiaries: French Navy (Marine nationale) and naval personnel

name: Systèmes d'information et de communication (defense 2)
description: Additional funding for military information and communication systems, including cybersecurity infrastructure, satellite communication, and interoperability programs.
beneficiaries: Armed forces communication units and cyber defense services

name: Autres remboursements et dégrèvements liés à la mécanique de l'impôt
description: Tax refunds and rebates arising from the normal mechanics of taxation, including overpayment corrections, carry-forward credits, and automatic adjustments.
beneficiaries: Individual and corporate taxpayers due mechanical refunds

name: Soutien des services opérationnels
description: Support to operational services within the Ministry of Interior, covering logistics, equipment, vehicles, and shared services for police and civil security forces.
beneficiaries: National Police, Gendarmerie support services, and civil security

name: Formation initiale et continue de niveau doctorat
description: Doctoral-level initial and continuing education, including PhD student funding (contrats doctoraux), post-doctoral positions, and doctoral school operations in universities.
beneficiaries: PhD students, post-doctoral researchers, and doctoral schools

name: Pilotage et mise en oeuvre des politiques éducatives
description: Steering and implementation of education policies at the national and academic level, including curriculum development, educational innovation, digital education, and student assessment.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Education central and regional services (rectorats)

name: Gestion équilibrée et durable des territoires
description: Balanced and sustainable territorial management, covering land-use planning, rural development, urban regeneration, and territorial cohesion policies.
beneficiaries: Local authorities, rural communities, and territorial planning agencies

name: Expertise, information géographique et météorologie
description: Geographic information, mapping, and meteorological services, funding IGN (national geographic institute) and Météo-France for public-interest data and expertise.
beneficiaries: IGN, Météo-France, and users of geographic and weather data

name: Activités des forces aériennes
description: Operational activities of the French Air and Space Force, including air defense, air policing, pilot training, air transport, and tactical air operations.
beneficiaries: Armée de l'Air et de l'Espace and air force personnel

name: Préparation et interventions spécialisées des moyens nationaux
description: Preparation and deployment of national civil security assets, including specialized rescue units (UIISC), aerial firefighting fleet, and mine-clearing services.
beneficiaries: Sécurité civile, UIISC units, and populations affected by disasters

name: Recherche et exploitation du renseignement intéressant la sécurité de la France
description: Intelligence gathering and analysis operations for national security, covering DGSE's technical and human intelligence capabilities and counterintelligence operations.
beneficiaries: DGSE and the French intelligence community

name: Inclusion dans l'emploi des personnes en situation de handicap
description: Employment inclusion programs for persons with disabilities, including subsidized employment, workplace adaptation, sheltered workshops (ESAT), and disability employment obligations.
beneficiaries: Workers with disabilities, ESAT workshops, and employers hiring disabled workers

name: Politique immobilière - Personnel
description: Personnel costs for staff working on defense real estate policy, including infrastructure planning, base management, and military construction project oversight.
beneficiaries: Defense infrastructure directorate (SID) personnel

name: Opérer en milieu hostile - SNA Barracuda
description: Barracuda-class nuclear attack submarine (SSN) program, providing the French Navy with next-generation attack submarines for anti-submarine warfare, intelligence, and power projection.
beneficiaries: French Navy, Naval Group, and defense supply chain

name: Reconnaissance de la Nation
description: National recognition programs for veterans and former combatants, including the titre de reconnaissance de la Nation (TRN) and associated moral and material benefits.
beneficiaries: Veterans of foreign operations and their families

name: Allocation de reconnaissance du combattant
description: Veteran recognition allowance (formerly retraite du combattant), a yearly payment to holders of the combatant card in recognition of military service in conflict zones.
beneficiaries: Holders of the combatant card (carte du combattant)

name: Aides indirectes
description: Indirect subsidies to the press sector including reduced postal rates, reduced VAT, and other fiscal advantages supporting newspaper and magazine distribution.
beneficiaries: Press publishers and newspaper distribution networks

name: Restitutions de prélèvement de solidarité
description: Refunds of the solidarity levy (prélèvement de solidarité) to eligible taxpayers, typically non-residents or those subject to treaty-based exemptions on investment income.
beneficiaries: Non-resident taxpayers and individuals entitled to solidarity levy refunds

name: Démonstration en conditions réelles, amorçage et premières commerciales
description: Funding for real-world demonstration projects, seed-stage investments, and first commercial deployments of innovative technologies under the PIA/France 2030 program.
beneficiaries: Innovative companies at demonstration and early commercialization stages

name: Recherche dans le domaine de l'énergie nucléaire
description: Nuclear energy research covering reactor technology, fuel cycle, nuclear safety, fusion research (ITER), and next-generation nuclear systems at CEA and partner labs.
beneficiaries: CEA, ITER Organization, and nuclear research laboratories

name: Soutien aux activités nucléaires du CEA
description: General support for CEA's civilian and dual-use nuclear activities, including facility operations, nuclear material management, and cross-cutting nuclear R&D support.
beneficiaries: Commissariat à l'énergie atomique et aux énergies alternatives (CEA)

name: Bibliothèques et documentation
description: National library services and public documentation, primarily funding the Bibliothèque nationale de France (BnF) and supporting public reading networks and heritage collections.
beneficiaries: BnF, public libraries, researchers, and the general public

name: Moyens de mise en oeuvre des politiques publiques et gestion des interventions
description: Operational resources for implementing public policies and managing state interventions, covering the administrative machinery for distributing grants, subsidies, and public services.
beneficiaries: State agencies administering public policy interventions

name: Monuments Historiques et patrimoine monumental
description: Conservation, restoration, and maintenance of France's historic monuments and monumental heritage, including listed buildings, cathedrals, and state-owned heritage sites.
beneficiaries: Owners of listed historic monuments, heritage conservation professionals

name: Actions territorialisées et dispositifs spécifiques de la politique de la ville
description: Place-based urban policy programs targeting disadvantaged neighborhoods (QPV), funding urban renewal, social cohesion, education priority zones, and economic development in priority areas.
beneficiaries: Residents of priority urban neighborhoods (quartiers prioritaires)

name: Autres remboursements et dégrèvements - dations, intérêts moratoires, remises de débets
description: Tax refunds related to payment-in-kind of tax liabilities (dation), moratory interest on late state refunds, and write-offs of debts owed to the state.
beneficiaries: Taxpayers settling obligations through artwork or property, and creditors of the state

name: Renseignement extérieur (2)
description: Additional operational funding for France's external intelligence service (DGSE), supporting overseas intelligence stations, technical intelligence, and covert operations.
beneficiaries: DGSE operational units and intelligence personnel

name: Réglementation générale, garantie de l'identité et de la nationalité et délivrance des titres
description: General regulation, identity assurance, and issuance of official documents (national ID cards, passports, residence permits), including civil registration and nationality processing.
beneficiaries: French citizens and foreign nationals applying for identity documents

name: Admission en non valeur d'impôts locaux (1)
description: Write-off of uncollectible local taxes (property tax, residence tax) when recovery is deemed impossible, with the state absorbing the loss to protect local government budgets.
beneficiaries: Local governments compensated for uncollectible local tax debts

name: Admission en non valeur d'impôts locaux (2)
description: Additional appropriation for writing off irrecoverable local tax debts, ensuring local authorities are not penalized by taxpayer insolvency or disappearance.
beneficiaries: Local governments and the state tax collection service

name: Aides à l'innovation bottom-up (subventions et prêts)
description: Bottom-up innovation grants and loans under France 2030/PIA supporting entrepreneur-driven innovation projects without predetermined thematic restrictions, administered by Bpifrance.
beneficiaries: Innovative SMEs and startups via Bpifrance

name: Opérer en milieu hostile - Autres opérations et conduire des opérations spéciales
description: Other hostile-environment operations and special operations forces capabilities, covering special forces equipment, training, and operational deployment.
beneficiaries: Special operations command (COS) and associated units

name: Recherches scientifiques et technologiques en sciences humaines et sociales
description: Funding for public research in humanities and social sciences, supporting CNRS social science labs, EHESS, and university-based research in economics, sociology, history, and related disciplines.
beneficiaries: CNRS humanities labs, universities, EHESS, and social science researchers

name: Allègements du coût du travail en agriculture (TODE-AG)
description: Reduction of labor costs in agriculture through employer social contribution exemptions for seasonal and permanent agricultural workers (travailleurs occasionnels demandeurs d'emploi).
beneficiaries: Agricultural employers and seasonal farm workers

name: Allègements de cotisations et contributions sociales
description: General reductions in employer social security contributions, primarily the Fillon reduction on low wages, designed to lower labor costs and boost employment.
beneficiaries: Employers, particularly those with low-wage workers

name: Projeter les forces - Avion de transport futur (A400M)
description: A400M military transport aircraft program providing strategic and tactical airlift capability, covering acquisition, in-service support, and operational integration.
beneficiaries: French Air and Space Force, Airbus Defence and Space

name: Paysages, eau et biodiversité
description: Landscape protection, water resource management, and biodiversity conservation, including wetland preservation, species protection, Natura 2000 sites, and landscape quality plans.
beneficiaries: Natural parks, environmental agencies (OFB), and protected area communities

name: Patrimoine des musées de France
description: Heritage collections and operations of France's national museums, covering acquisitions, conservation, restoration, exhibitions, and public access to museum collections.
beneficiaries: National museums (Louvre, Orsay, etc.), curators, and museum visitors

name: Taxe d'habitation (1)
description: Residence tax rebates and exemptions granted to eligible households, with the state compensating local authorities for the resulting revenue loss.
beneficiaries: Households benefiting from residence tax exemptions and local authorities

name: Taxe d'habitation (2)
description: Additional compensation to local authorities for the progressive elimination of the residence tax on primary residences, which was fully abolished for all households by 2023.
beneficiaries: Local authorities losing residence tax revenue

name: Agence pour l'enseignement français à l'étranger
description: Subsidy to AEFE, the agency managing the network of French schools abroad (lycées français), covering teacher salaries, school operations, and scholarships for French students overseas.
beneficiaries: AEFE, French schools abroad, and French families living overseas

name: Soutien et formation (gendarmerie)
description: Support services and training for the Gendarmerie nationale, covering initial and continuing training of gendarmes, school operations, and administrative support functions.
beneficiaries: Gendarmerie nationale training schools and gendarme trainees

name: Sécurité routière (police)
description: Road safety enforcement by national police forces, covering traffic patrols, speed cameras, drunk driving enforcement, and accident investigation by police units.
beneficiaries: National Police traffic units and road users

name: Coordination de la sécurité et de la défense
description: Coordination of national security and defense policy through the SGDSN (Secrétariat général de la défense et de la sécurité nationale), covering crisis management, cyber defense coordination, and classified information protection.
beneficiaries: SGDSN, ANSSI (cyber), and the national security coordination apparatus

name: Gestion des milieux et biodiversité
description: Management of natural habitats and biodiversity, funding the Office français de la biodiversité (OFB), water agencies, and programs for species conservation and ecosystem restoration.
beneficiaries: OFB, water agencies, nature reserves, and environmental NGOs

name: Protection et accompagnement des enfants, des jeunes et des familles vulnérables
description: Child protection and family support services, covering at-risk children, foster care coordination, family mediation, and support for vulnerable youth and families.
beneficiaries: At-risk children, foster families, child welfare services, and vulnerable families

name: Sécurité routière - Hors administration centrale et cabinets
description: Local-level road safety measures outside central administration, including departmental road safety observatories, local prevention campaigns, and infrastructure safety audits.
beneficiaries: Local road safety coordinators and road users in departments

name: Pilotage, soutien - Personnel
description: Personnel costs for staff providing steering and support functions within the Ministry of Ecological Transition, covering HR, finance, and administrative management.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Ecological Transition administrative staff

name: Assurer la protection des forces et des sites - Autres opérations et protection de l'homme
description: Force protection and site security programs including CBRN defense, personal protective equipment, and soldier modernization (FÉLIN system and successors).
beneficiaries: Ground forces, military bases, and individual soldiers

name: Prestations d'appui et support
description: Administrative support services and back-office functions provided by central ministry departments, including shared services, procurement, and facility management.
beneficiaries: Government agencies receiving centralized support services

name: Exploitation et innovation de la Navigation aérienne
description: Operations and innovation of French air navigation services (DSNA), covering air traffic control, flight information services, and modernization of ATM systems (SESAR).
beneficiaries: DSNA (Direction des services de la navigation aérienne) and airlines

name: Pilotage, soutien et communication (Ministry of Culture)
description: Central steering, administrative support, and communication for the Ministry of Culture, covering strategic planning, HR, IT, legal affairs, and public communications.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Culture central administration

name: Gestion des moyens et subventions
description: Management of resources and grant distribution within the Ministry of Agriculture, covering administrative costs of subsidy programs and operational support.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Agriculture central and regional services

name: Enseignement supérieur
description: Higher education funding covering university operations, academic staff salaries, student services, and the development of France's public higher education system.
beneficiaries: Public universities, grandes écoles, and higher education students

name: Exonérations de soutien à la création d'entreprise
description: Social contribution exemptions supporting business creation, including ACRE (aide à la création ou reprise d'entreprise) reducing charges for new entrepreneurs.
beneficiaries: New business creators and entrepreneurs

name: Espace - Communiquer - Moyens de communication satellitaire
description: Military satellite communication systems (COMSAT NG, Syracuse), providing secure and resilient communications to deployed French forces worldwide.
beneficiaries: French armed forces, DGA, and military satellite operators

name: Information et orientation
description: Student information and career guidance services in education, covering career counseling centers (CIO), digital orientation platforms (Parcoursup), and career education.
beneficiaries: Students, families, and educational guidance counselors

name: Moyens des DRAAF, DAAF et DDT(M)
description: Resources for regional and departmental agriculture, food, and forestry directorates (DRAAF/DAAF/DDT), covering local implementation of agricultural, food safety, and land-use policies.
beneficiaries: DRAAF, DAAF, and DDT(M) staff and operations

name: Système d'information et de communication (Interior)
description: Information and communication systems for the Ministry of Interior, covering police databases, emergency call systems, radio networks, and IT infrastructure for internal security.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Interior IT services, police, and gendarmerie

name: Soutien à la démocratisation et à l'éducation artistique et culturelle
description: Programs to democratize access to culture and develop arts education, including cultural passes for youth (Pass Culture), arts education in schools, and cultural outreach in underserved areas.
beneficiaries: Young people, schools, cultural institutions, and underserved communities

name: Recherche et enseignement supérieur en matière économique et industrielle
description: Higher education and research in economics and industry, supporting engineering schools (Mines, Télécom), business schools, and applied research linked to industrial innovation.
beneficiaries: Engineering schools, business schools (under Ministry of Economy), and researchers

name: Personnels mettant en œuvre les politiques d'amélioration de la qualité de l'emploi
description: Personnel costs for labor inspectors and staff implementing policies to improve employment quality, working conditions, and labor relations.
beneficiaries: Labor inspectorate staff and workplace relations services

name: Frapper à distance - Autres opérations
description: Other long-range strike capability programs beyond main platforms, including precision-guided munitions, cruise missiles, and standoff weapons systems.
beneficiaries: French Air Force, Navy, and munitions manufacturers

name: Intégration et accès à la nationalité française
description: Integration programs for legally resident foreigners and processing of French nationality applications, covering language training, civic integration contracts, and naturalization procedures.
beneficiaries: Legal immigrants, naturalization applicants, and OFII (immigration office)

name: Fonctionnement courant des services
description: Day-to-day operational costs of government services, covering supplies, utilities, IT maintenance, travel, and miscellaneous administrative expenses.
beneficiaries: Government departments and agencies

name: Performance et résilience des bâtiments de l'État et de ses opérateurs
description: Energy performance upgrades and resilience improvements for state buildings and public agency facilities, including thermal renovation, seismic reinforcement, and climate adaptation.
beneficiaries: Government-owned buildings and public operators

name: Financement des aides aux collectivités pour l'électrification rurale
description: Subsidies for rural electrification, funding the extension, reinforcement, and modernization of electricity distribution networks in rural areas via the FACÉ fund.
beneficiaries: Rural municipalities, electricity distribution authorities, and Enedis

name: Mise en oeuvre de la politique de sécurité et de qualité sanitaires de l'alimentation
description: Implementation of food safety and sanitary quality policy, covering veterinary and phytosanitary inspections, food fraud investigations, and official food safety controls.
beneficiaries: DGAL inspectors, food businesses, and consumers

name: Dépenses immobilières de l'administration territoriale
description: Real estate expenditures for territorial administration buildings (prefectures, sub-prefectures), covering maintenance, renovation, lease payments, and construction projects.
beneficiaries: Prefectures and sub-prefectures

name: Numérique
description: Digital transformation investments under France 2030, supporting cloud computing, AI, quantum technologies, semiconductors, and digital sovereignty initiatives.
beneficiaries: Tech companies, digital startups, and public digital infrastructure

name: Anticipation et accompagnement des conséquences des mutations économiques sur l'emploi
description: Anticipating and managing the employment impact of economic changes, including retraining programs, sectoral restructuring support, and job transition assistance.
beneficiaries: Workers affected by economic restructuring and declining industries

name: Opérer en milieu hostile - Frégates de taille intermédiaire
description: FDI (Frégate de défense et d'intervention) medium-size frigate program for the French Navy, providing modern multi-mission warships for naval combat and force projection.
beneficiaries: French Navy, Naval Group, and defense industrial base

name: Infrastructures maritimes
description: Maritime infrastructure development and maintenance, covering port facilities, harbor access channels, navigational aids, lighthouses, and coastal protection works.
beneficiaries: Major seaports, port authorities, and maritime transport operators

name: Organismes de formation supérieure et de recherche
description: Funding for specialized higher education and research institutions outside the university system, including national schools, research institutes, and observatories.
beneficiaries: Grandes écoles, specialized research institutes, and national observatories

name: Amélioration du cadre de vie
description: Urban environment improvement programs including public space renovation, green infrastructure, noise reduction, and quality of life enhancements in residential areas.
beneficiaries: Municipalities, urban residents, and neighborhood improvement projects

name: Développement de la technologie spatiale au service de l'observation de la terre
description: Development of space-based Earth observation technologies including environmental monitoring satellites, climate observation, and cartographic satellite systems.
beneficiaries: CNES, ESA, and environmental monitoring agencies

name: Opérations immobilières et entretien des bâtiments de l'État
description: State building construction projects, major renovations, and routine maintenance of government-owned real estate, managed by the state property directorate.
beneficiaries: Government departments and the Direction de l'immobilier de l'État (DIE)

name: Grandes infrastructures de recherche
description: Large-scale research infrastructures including particle accelerators, synchrotron facilities, supercomputers, ocean research vessels, and other major shared scientific equipment.
beneficiaries: CNRS, CEA, universities, and international research collaborations

name: Mesures exceptionnelles de protection des consommateurs
description: Exceptional consumer protection measures including energy price caps, fuel rebates, and other emergency shields against energy price spikes during the energy crisis.
beneficiaries: Households and businesses facing energy price increases

name: Structures et dispositifs de sécurité routière
description: Road safety infrastructure and devices including speed cameras, automatic enforcement systems, road signage, and safety equipment on dangerous road sections.
beneficiaries: Road safety authorities and road users

name: Livre et lecture
description: Book and reading policy supporting the book industry chain, public libraries, bookshops, publishing, and reading promotion, including the Centre national du livre.
beneficiaries: Public libraries, publishers, bookshops, authors, and the Centre national du livre

name: Personnels mettant en œuvre les politiques sociales et de la santé
description: Personnel costs for staff implementing social and health policies in regional and departmental directorates (DREETS, ARS), covering social cohesion and public health functions.
beneficiaries: DREETS and ARS staff working on social and health policy

name: Transports collectifs
description: Public transport investment support, including state co-financing for urban transit projects (tramways, metro extensions, BRT), rail station improvements, and mobility plans.
beneficiaries: Urban transport authorities, SNCF, and public transit users

name: Pilotage et animation (agriculture)
description: Strategic steering and coordination of agricultural policies, including ministry leadership, policy evaluation, interministerial coordination, and communication.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Agriculture central administration

name: Commander et conduire - SCCOA
description: SCCOA (Système de commandement et de conduite des opérations aériennes) program providing integrated air defense command and control for French airspace surveillance and air operations.
beneficiaries: French Air and Space Force, air defense units

name: Développement du sport de haut niveau
description: Development of high-level competitive sports, including athlete training centers (INSEP), sports federations support, Olympic preparation, and anti-doping programs.
beneficiaries: Elite athletes, INSEP, sports federations, and Olympic committee

name: Soutien aux établissements d'enseignement supérieur et insertion professionnelle
description: Support to higher education institutions for student services and professional insertion, including career services, internship programs, and employability initiatives.
beneficiaries: Universities, their career services, and graduating students

name: Gestion durable de la forêt et développement de la filière bois
description: Sustainable forest management and timber industry development, funding ONF (national forests office), forestry research, wildfire prevention, and wood industry competitiveness.
beneficiaries: ONF, forest owners, timber industry, and forestry workers

name: France Médias Monde (1)
description: Public subsidy to France Médias Monde, the holding company for France's international broadcasting (France 24 TV, RFI radio, MCD), providing French-language and multilingual media worldwide.
beneficiaries: France 24, RFI, Monte Carlo Doualiya, and international audiences

name: France Media Monde (2)
description: Additional allocation to France Médias Monde for international broadcasting operations, digital platform development, and journalist safety programs.
beneficiaries: France Médias Monde group and its editorial staff

name: Gestion des crises et des aléas de la production agricole
description: Agricultural crisis management and production risk mitigation, including crop insurance subsidies, emergency aid for natural disasters, and livestock disease compensation.
beneficiaries: Farmers affected by climate events, epidemics, or market crises

name: Soutien (Ministry of Agriculture)
description: Cross-cutting support functions for the Ministry of Agriculture, covering IT systems, financial management, HR administration, and shared services.
beneficiaries: Ministry of Agriculture central and regional services

name: Action sociale, chômage et pensions (defense)
description: Social welfare, unemployment benefits, and pension contributions for defense personnel, covering welfare programs for military families, unemployment support for former military, and pension fund contributions.
beneficiaries: Military personnel, their families, and defense ministry civilian staff

name: Planification écologique
description: Ecological planning coordinated by the SGPE (Secrétariat général à la planification écologique), covering cross-cutting climate and biodiversity strategy implementation across all government sectors.
beneficiaries: All sectors subject to ecological transition planning

name: Frapper à distance - SCAF
description: Future Combat Air System (SCAF/FCAS) development program, a Franco-German-Spanish next-generation fighter aircraft and combat cloud system intended to replace the Rafale by 2040.
beneficiaries: Dassault Aviation, Airbus, Indra, and European defense industry

name: Aide à l'insertion et à la qualification professionnelle
description: Vocational integration and qualification assistance, supporting professional insertion programs, apprenticeship preparation, and qualification pathways for low-skilled workers.
beneficiaries: Low-skilled jobseekers and workers seeking professional qualifications

name: Routes - Entretien
description: National road network maintenance including resurfacing, structural repairs, bridge maintenance, tunnel upkeep, and winter road management on state-managed highways.
beneficiaries: DIR (interdepartmental road directorates) and road users

name: Préparation et conduite des opérations d'armement
description: Management and execution of armament programs by the DGA (Direction générale de l'armement), covering project management, testing, quality assurance, and industrial oversight.
beneficiaries: DGA, defense industry firms, and French armed forces

name: Action informatique ministérielle
description: Ministry-level IT operations covering software development, infrastructure management, digital workplace tools, and interministerial information system projects.
beneficiaries: Ministry IT departments and digital services

name: Maîtrise des technologies orbitales et de l'innovation technologique
description: Mastery of orbital technologies and space innovation, funding CNES programs for satellite platforms, orbital mechanics research, and cutting-edge space technology development.
beneficiaries: CNES, space technology startups, and European space programs

name: Personnel du SGA employeur
description: Personnel costs for staff under the Secrétariat général pour l'administration (SGA) of the Ministry of Defense, the civilian employer authority for defense administration.
beneficiaries: SGA civilian employees within the Ministry of Defense

name: Personnels œuvrant pour la politique de la prévention des risques
description: Personnel costs for staff implementing risk prevention policies including industrial risk control (SEVESO sites), natural hazard prevention, and environmental health protection.
beneficiaries: DREAL inspectors and risk prevention specialists

name: Développement de la technologie spatiale au service de la science
description: Space technology for scientific purposes, funding scientific satellites, space probes, telescope missions, and contributions to ESA science programs.
beneficiaries: CNES, ESA science directorate, and space science researchers

name: Travaux et gros entretien à la charge du propriétaire
